26813.title: Early Childhood Care and Cognitive Development
26813.zh_title: 早期儿童照护与认知发展
26813.authors: Juan Chaparro, Aaron Sojourner, Matthew J. Wiswall
26813.abstract: This paper combines multiple sources of information on early childhood development in a unified model for analysis of a wide range of early childhood policy interventions. We develop a model of child care in which households decide both the quantities and qualities of maternal and non-maternal care along with maternal labor supply. The model introduces a novel parenting-effort channel, whereby child care subsidies that permit less parenting may enable better parenting. To estimate the model, we combine observational data with experimental data from the Infant Health and Development Program (IHDP) which randomly assigned free child care when the child was 1 and 2 years old. We estimate a cognitive skill production function and household preferences, giving insight into mechanisms driving the ex post heterogeneous effects of the IHDP intervention, accounting for alternative care substitutes available to the control group and spillovers of the child care offer across the household's decisions. We also estimate ex ante effects of counterfactual policies such as an offer of lower-quality care, requiring a co-pay for subsidized care, raising the maternal wage offer, or a cash transfer. Finally, we use the model to rationalize existing evidence from outside the US on the effects of universal child care programs.
26813.zh_abstract: 本文将关于早期儿童发展的多种信息来源整合到一个统一模型中，用于分析广泛的早期儿童政策干预。我们构建了一个儿童照护模型，其中家庭同时决定母亲照护与非母亲照护的数量和质量，以及母亲的劳动供给。该模型引入了一个新颖的育儿努力渠道，即允许减少育儿时间的儿童照护补贴，反而可能促成更好的育儿质量。为估计该模型，我们将观察数据与来自“婴儿健康与发展项目”（IHDP）的实验数据相结合，该项目在儿童1岁和2岁时随机提供免费儿童照护。我们估计了认知技能生产函数和家庭偏好，从而深入理解驱动IHDP干预事后异质性效应的机制，并考虑了对照组可获得的替代照护选择以及儿童照护提供对家庭决策的溢出效应。我们还估计了反事实政策的事前效应，例如提供低质量照护、要求对补贴照护进行共付、提高母亲工资或提供现金转移。最后，我们利用该模型来解释美国以外关于普及儿童照护项目效果的现有证据。

26812.title: Prices and Federal Policies in Opioid Markets
26812.zh_title: 阿片类药物市场的价格与联邦政策
26812.abstract: Consumer theory is extended to incorporate deviations from the law of one price that are common in markets for prescription and illicitly-manufactured opioids. The extension helps to resolve “puzzling” findings in the literature, such as race and age gaps in mortality rates and a failure of increases in the full price of Rx opioids to reduce opioid fatalities. The theory also identifies characteristics of public policies that are essential for predicting consumer behavior and thereby population life expectancy. Most surprising is that, with heroin and fentanyl relatively cheap of late, any Rx opioid policy could – and likely does – have the opposite total-consumption effect after 2013 than it would before, especially when the more expensive Rx opioid products are differentially affected. The theoretical framework also guides assembly of a dataset of federal opioid policies and assessment of the role of technological change and law enforcement in illicit markets.
26812.zh_abstract: 消费者理论被扩展，以纳入处方阿片类药物和非法制造阿片类药物市场中常见的一价定律偏离。这一扩展有助于解决文献中的“令人费解”的发现，例如死亡率中的种族和年龄差距，以及处方阿片类药物全价上涨未能减少阿片类药物致死人数。该理论还识别了预测消费者行为从而预测人口预期寿命所必需的公共政策特征。最令人惊讶的是，鉴于海洛因和芬太尼近期相对便宜，任何处方阿片类药物政策在2013年之后可能（而且很可能确实）产生与之前相反的总消费效应，尤其是当更昂贵的处方阿片类药物产品受到差异化影响时。该理论框架还指导了联邦阿片类药物政策数据集的构建，以及对非法市场中技术变革和执法作用的评估。

26811.title: Intended and Unintended Effects of Banning Menthol Cigarettes
26811.zh_title: 禁止薄荷醇香烟的预期与非预期效应
26811.abstract: Bans on menthol cigarettes have been recommended by the World Health Organization, adopted throughout the European Union, and proposed by the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA), primarily due to concerns that menthol cigarettes enable youth smoking. Yet there is almost no direct evidence on their effects using real-world policy variation. We provide the first comprehensive evaluation of this policy by studying Canada where seven provinces banned menthol cigarettes prior to a nationwide menthol ban in 2018. Using provincial sales data, we show that menthol cigarette sales fell to zero immediately after menthol bans, with no meaningful effect on non-menthol sales. Survey data confirm that provincial menthol bans significantly reduced menthol cigarette smoking among both youths and adults. We also find strong evidence of substitution, however: provincial menthol bans significantly increased non-menthol cigarette smoking among youths, resulting in no overall net change in youth smoking rates. We also document evidence of evasion: provincial menthol bans shifted smokers’ cigarette purchases away from grocery stores and gas stations to First Nations reserves (where the menthol bans do not bind). Our results demonstrate the importance of accounting for substitution and evasion responses in the design of stricter tobacco regulations.
26811.zh_abstract: 世界卫生组织已建议禁止薄荷醇香烟，欧盟已全面采纳，美国食品药品监督管理局也已提出此建议，主要原因是担心薄荷醇香烟助长青少年吸烟。然而，利用现实世界政策变化获得的直接证据几乎为零。我们通过研究加拿大（在2018年全国性薄荷醇禁令之前，已有七个省份实施了禁令）来提供对这一政策的首次全面评估。利用省级销售数据，我们显示薄荷醇禁令后薄荷醇香烟销量立即降至零，而对非薄荷醇香烟销量没有显著影响。调查数据证实，省级薄荷醇禁令显著减少了青少年和成年人的薄荷醇香烟吸食。然而，我们也发现了强烈的替代证据：省级薄荷醇禁令显著增加了青少年的非薄荷醇香烟吸食，导致青少年吸烟率总体净变化为零。我们还记录了规避行为的证据：省级薄荷醇禁令将吸烟者的香烟购买从杂货店和加油站转移到了原住民保留地（薄荷醇禁令在那里不适用）。我们的结果证明了在设计更严格的烟草法规时考虑替代和规避反应的重要性。

26810.title: Human Capital as Engine of Growth – The Role of Knowledge Transfers in Promoting Balanced Growth Within and Across Countries
26810.zh_title: 人力资本作为增长引擎——知识转移在促进国家内部和国家间平衡增长中的作用
26810.abstract: Unlike physical capital, human capital has both embodied and disembodied dimensions. It can be perceived of as skill and acquired knowledge, but also as knowledge spillover effects between overlapping generations and across different skill groups within and across countries. We illustrate the roles these characteristics play in the process of economic development; the relation between income growth and income and fertility distributions; and the relevance of human capital in determining the skill distribution of immigrants in a balanced-growth global equilibrium setting. In all three illustrations, knowledge spillover effects play a key role. The analysis offers new insights for understanding the decline in fertility below population replacement rate in many developed countries; the evolution of income and fertility distributions across developing and developed countries; and the often asymmetric effects that endogenous immigration flows and their skill composition exert on the long-term net benefits from immigration to natives in source and destination countries.
26810.zh_abstract: 与物质资本不同，人力资本具有体现性和非体现性两个维度。它既可以被视为技能和习得知识，也可以被视为代际之间以及国家内部和国家间不同技能群体之间的知识溢出效应。我们阐述了这些特征在经济发展过程中的作用；收入增长与收入和生育率分布之间的关系；以及在平衡增长的全球均衡环境中，人力资本在决定移民技能分布方面的相关性。在所有三个阐述中，知识溢出效应都发挥着关键作用。该分析为理解许多发达国家生育率降至人口更替水平以下、发展中国家和发达国家之间收入和生育率分布的演变，以及内生移民流动及其技能构成对来源国和目的地国本土居民长期净收益的通常不对称影响，提供了新的见解。
26810.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, EH, ITI, PR；JEL：F22, F43, J11, J24, O15

26809.title: Trust and Saving in Financial Institutions by the Poor
26809.zh_title: 贫困人群对金融机构的信任与储蓄
26809.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Paul Gertler, Camila Navajas Ahumada
26809.abstract: We randomly assigned beneficiaries of a conditional cash transfer program in Peru to attend a 3 hour training session designed to build their trust in financial institutions. We find that the intervention: (a) increased trust in banks, but had no effect on financial literacy, and (b) increased savings over a ten month period. The increase in savings represents a 1.4 percentage point increase in the savings rate out of the cash transfer deposits, and a 0.4 percentage point increase in the savings rate out of household income.
26809.zh_abstract: 我们随机分配秘鲁有条件现金转移项目的受益者参加一个为期3小时的培训课程，该课程旨在建立他们对金融机构的信任。我们发现该干预措施：（a）增加了对银行的信任，但对金融素养没有影响，以及（b）在十个月期间增加了储蓄。储蓄的增加意味着现金转移存款的储蓄率提高了1.4个百分点，家庭收入的储蓄率提高了0.4个百分点。

26808.title: What Determines Consumer Financial Distress? Place- and Person-Based Factors
26808.zh_title: 什么决定了消费者财务困境？——基于地点和基于个人的因素
26808.authors: Benjamin J. Keys, Neale Mahoney, Hanbin Yang
26808.abstract: We use credit report data to study consumer financial distress in America. We show there are large, persistent disparities in financial distress across regions. To understand these patterns, we conduct a “movers” analysis. For collections and default, there is only weak convergence following a move, suggesting these types of distress are not primarily caused by place-based factors (e.g., local economic conditions and state laws) but instead reflect person-based characteristics (e.g., financial literacy and risk preferences). In contrast, for personal bankruptcy, we find a sizable place-based effect, which is consistent with anecdotal evidence on how local legal factors influence personal bankruptcy.
26808.zh_abstract: 我们利用信用报告数据研究美国消费者的财务困境。我们显示不同地区之间存在巨大且持续的财务困境差异。为了理解这些模式，我们进行了一项“迁移者”分析。对于催收和违约，迁移后仅出现微弱的趋同，这表明这些类型的困境并非主要由基于地点的因素（例如，当地经济状况和州法律）引起，而是反映了基于个人的特征（例如，金融素养和风险偏好）。相比之下，对于个人破产，我们发现了相当大的基于地点的效应，这与关于当地法律因素如何影响个人破产的轶事证据一致。
26808.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS, PE；JEL：G5, G51, K35

26807.title: Does Information About Climate Risk Affect Property Values?
26807.zh_title: 关于气候风险的信息会影响房产价值吗？
26807.abstract: Floods and other climate hazards pose a widespread and growing threat to housing and infrastructure around the world. By incorporating climate risk into asset prices, markets can discourage excessive development in hazardous areas. However, the extent to which markets actually price these risks remains poorly understood. Here we measure the effect of information about flood risk on residential property values in the United States. Using multiple empirical approaches and two decades of sales data covering the universe of homes in the US, we find little evidence that housing markets fully price information about flood risk in aggregate. However, the price penalty for flood risk is larger for commercial buyers and in states where sellers must disclose information about flood risk to potential buyers, suggesting that policies to improve risk communication could influence market outcomes. Our findings indicate that floodplain homes in the US are currently overvalued by a total of $\$34$B, raising concerns about the stability of real estate markets as climate risks become more salient and severe.
26807.zh_abstract: 洪水和其他气候灾害对世界各地的住房和基础设施构成了广泛且日益严重的威胁。通过将气候风险纳入资产价格，市场可以阻止在危险区域的过度开发。然而，市场实际定价这些风险的程度仍然知之甚少。在此，我们衡量了关于洪水风险的信息对美国住宅房产价值的影响。使用多种实证方法和涵盖美国所有房屋的二十年销售数据，我们发现几乎没有证据表明住房市场在总体上完全定价了关于洪水风险的信息。然而，对于商业买家以及卖方必须向潜在买家披露洪水风险信息的州，洪水风险的价格惩罚更大，这表明改善风险沟通的政策可能会影响市场结果。我们的研究结果表明，美国洪泛区房屋目前被高估了总计340亿美元，这引发了人们对随着气候风险变得更加显著和严重，房地产市场稳定性的担忧。

26806.title: Network-Based Hiring: Local Benefits; Global Costs
26806.zh_title: 基于网络的招聘：局部收益；全局成本
26806.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Melanie Morten, Alessandra Peter
26806.abstract: Entrepreneurs, particularly in the developing world, often hire from their networks: friends, family, and resulting referrals. Network hiring has two benefits, documented extensively in the empirical literature: entrepreneurs know more about the ability of their network (and indeed they are often positively selected), and network members may be less likely to engage in moral hazard. We study theoretically how network hiring affects the size and composition (i.e., whether to hire friends or strangers) of the firm. Our primary result is that network hiring, while locally beneficial, can be globally inefficient. Because of the existence of a network, entrepreneurs set inefficiently low wages, firms are weakly too small, rely too much on networks for hiring, and resulting welfare losses increase in the quality of the network. Further, if entrepreneurs are uncertain about the true quality of the external labor market, the economy may become stuck in an information poverty trap where forward-looking entrepreneurs or even entrepreneurs in a market with social learning never learn the correct distribution of stranger ability, exacerbating welfare losses. We show that the poverty trap can worsen when network referrals are of higher quality.
26806.zh_abstract: 企业家，尤其是在发展中国家，通常从他们的网络中招聘：朋友、家人以及由此产生的推荐。网络招聘有两个在实证文献中得到广泛记录的好处：企业家更了解其网络成员的能力（事实上，他们通常是被正向选择的），并且网络成员可能不太容易发生道德风险。我们从理论上研究了网络招聘如何影响企业的规模和构成（即，是招聘朋友还是陌生人）。我们的主要结果是，网络招聘虽然局部有益，但可能全局无效率。由于网络的存在，企业家设定的工资过低，企业规模过小，过度依赖网络进行招聘，由此产生的福利损失随着网络质量的提高而增加。此外，如果企业家对外部劳动力市场的真实质量不确定，经济可能会陷入信息贫困陷阱，即使是前瞻性的企业家，或者处于具有社会学习的市场中的企业家，也永远无法了解陌生人能力的正确分布，从而加剧福利损失。我们表明，当网络推荐的质量更高时，贫困陷阱可能会恶化。
26806.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D83, D86, J46, L14, O1

26805.title: Housing Discrimination and the Toxics Exposure Gap in the United States: Evidence from the Rental Market
26805.zh_title: 美国住房歧视与有毒物质暴露差距：来自租赁市场的证据
26805.authors: Peter Christensen, Ignacio Sarmiento-Barbieri, Christopher Timmins
26805.abstract: Local pollution exposures disproportionately impact minority households, but the root causes remain unclear. This study conducts a correspondence experiment on a major online housing platform to test whether housing discrimination constrains minority access to housing options in markets with significant sources of airborne chemical toxics. We find that renters with African American or Hispanic/LatinX names are 41% less likely than renters with White names to receive responses for properties in low-exposure locations. We find no evidence of discriminatory constraints in high-exposure locations, indicating that discrimination increases relative access to housing choices at elevated exposure risk.
26805.zh_abstract: 局部污染暴露对少数族裔家庭的影响尤为严重，但其根本原因尚不明确。本研究在一个主要在线住房平台上进行通信实验，以检验住房歧视是否限制了少数族裔在存在显著空气化学有毒物质来源的市场中获得住房选择。我们发现，与非裔美国人或西班牙裔/拉丁裔名字的租房者相比，白人名字的租房者在低暴露地点获得房产回复的可能性高出41%。在高暴露地点，我们没有发现歧视性限制的证据，这表明歧视增加了在暴露风险较高的情况下获得住房选择的相对机会。

26804.title: The Electric Vehicle Transition and the Economics of Banning Gasoline Vehicles
26804.zh_title: 电动汽车转型与禁止汽油车的经济学分析
26804.authors: Stephen P. Holland, Erin T. Mansur, Andrew J. Yates
26804.abstract: Electric vehicles have a unique potential to transform personal transportation. We analyze the transition to electric vehicles with a dynamic model that captures the falling costs of producing electric vehicles, the decreasing pollution from electricity generation, the increasing substitutability of electric for gasoline vehicles, and the durability of the vehicle stock. Due to the external costs from pollution, inefficiencies under business as usual result from the mix of vehicles as well as the transition timing, the severity of which depends on substitutability. We calibrate the model to the US market and find the magnitude of the inefficiency is rather modest: less than 5 percent of total external costs. The optimal purchase subsidy for electric vehicles and the optimal ban on the production of gasoline vehicles both give about the same efficiency improvement, but the latter leads to a sharp increase in gasoline vehicle production just before the ban. Phasing out gasoline vehicles with a bankable production quota reduces deadweight loss substantially more than the other policies, but may lead to a very large deadweight loss if set incorrectly.
26804.zh_abstract: 电动汽车在改变个人交通方式方面具有独特潜力。我们通过一个动态模型分析向电动汽车的转型，该模型捕捉了电动汽车生产成本下降、发电污染减少、电动汽车对汽油车替代性增强以及车辆存量的耐用性。由于污染的外部成本，在常规经营模式下，效率低下源于车辆组合以及转型时机，其严重程度取决于替代性。我们将模型校准到美国市场，发现效率低下的程度相当温和：不到总外部成本的5%。电动汽车的最优购买补贴和汽油车生产的最优禁令都带来了大致相同的效率提升，但后者导致禁令前汽油车产量急剧增加。通过可交易的产量配额逐步淘汰汽油车，其无谓损失减少幅度远大于其他政策，但如果设置不当，可能导致非常大的无谓损失。

26803.title: Utilization-Adjusted TFP Across Countries: Measurement and Implications for International Comovement
26803.zh_title: 跨国调整利用率的全要素生产率：测量及其对国际联动的影响
26803.authors: Zhen Huo, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
26803.abstract: This paper develops estimates of TFP growth adjusted for movements in unobserved factor utilization for a panel of 29 countries and up to 37 years. When factor utilization changes are unobserved, the commonly used Solow residual mismeasures actual changes in TFP. We use a general equilibrium dynamic multi-country multi-sector model to derive a production function estimating equation that corrects for unobserved factor usage. We compare the properties of utilization-adjusted TFP series to the standard Solow residual, and quantify the roles of both TFP and utilization for international business cycle comovement. Utilization-adjusted TFP is virtually uncorrelated across countries, and does not generate much GDP comovement through its propagation. Shocks to factor utilization can more successfully account for international co-movement.
26803.zh_abstract: 本文为29个国家（时间跨度长达37年）的面板数据，开发了经未观测到的要素利用率变动调整后的全要素生产率增长估计。当要素利用率变化未被观测到时，常用的索洛残差会错误衡量全要素生产率的实际变化。我们使用一个一般均衡动态多国多部门模型，推导出一个生产函数估计方程，该方程纠正了未观测到的要素使用情况。我们将调整利用率后的全要素生产率序列与标准索洛残差进行比较，并量化全要素生产率和利用率在国际商业周期联动中的作用。调整利用率后的全要素生产率在国家间几乎不相关，并且通过其传导不会产生显著的GDP联动。要素利用率冲击能更成功地解释国际联动。

26802.title: Dynamic Banking and the Value of Deposits
26802.zh_title: 动态银行业务与存款价值
26802.authors: Patrick Bolton, Ye Li, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
26802.abstract: We propose a theory of banking in which banks cannot perfectly control deposit flows. Facing uninsurable loan and deposit shocks, banks dynamically manage lending, wholesale funding, deposits, and equity. Deposits create value by lowering funding costs. However, when the bank is undercapitalized and at risk of breaching leverage requirements, the marginal value of deposits can turn negative as deposit inflows, by raising leverage, increase the likelihood of costly equity issuance. Banks’ inability to fully control leverage distinguishes them from non-depository intermediaries. Our model suggests a re-evaluation of leverage regulations and offers new perspectives on banking in a low interest-rate environment.
26802.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个银行理论，其中银行无法完全控制存款流动。面对不可保险的贷款和存款冲击，银行动态管理贷款、批发融资、存款和股权。存款通过降低融资成本创造价值。然而，当银行资本不足且面临违反杠杆要求的风险时，存款的边际价值可能转为负值，因为存款流入通过提高杠杆，增加了昂贵股权发行的可能性。银行无法完全控制杠杆，这使其区别于非存款中介机构。我们的模型建议重新评估杠杆监管，并为低利率环境下的银行业提供新视角。

26801.title: A New Mechanism to Alleviate the Crises of Confidence in Science-With An Application to the Public Goods Game
26801.zh_title: 缓解科学信任危机的新机制——以公共品博弈为例
26801.authors: Luigi Butera, Philip J. Grossman, Daniel Houser, John A. List, Marie-Claire Villeval
26801.abstract: Creation of empirical knowledge in economics has taken a dramatic turn in the past few decades. One feature of the new research landscape is the nature and extent to which scholars generate data. Today, in nearly every field the experimental approach plays an increasingly crucial role in testing theories and informing organizational decisions. Whereas there is much to appreciate about this revolution, recently a credibility crisis has taken hold across the social sciences, arguing that an important component of Fischer (1935)'s tripod has not been fully embraced: replication. Indeed, while the importance of replications is not debatable scientifically, current incentives are not sufficient to encourage replications from the individual researcher's perspective. We analyze a novel mechanism that promotes replications by leveraging mutually beneficial gains between scholars and editors. We develop a model capturing the trade-offs involved in seeking independent replications before submission of a paper to journals. We demonstrate the operation of this method via an investigation of the effects of Knightian uncertainty on cooperation rates in public goods games, a pervasive and yet largely unexplored feature in the literature.
26801.zh_abstract: 经济学中经验知识的创造在过去几十年发生了戏剧性转变。新研究格局的一个特征是学者生成数据的性质和程度。如今，几乎在每个领域，实验方法在检验理论和指导组织决策方面都发挥着越来越关键的作用。尽管这场革命有很多值得赞赏之处，但最近社会科学领域出现了一场可信度危机，认为费希尔（1935）三脚架的一个重要组成部分尚未被完全接受：复制。事实上，虽然复制的重要性在科学上无可争议，但从个体研究者的角度来看，当前的激励不足以鼓励复制。我们分析了一种新机制，该机制通过利用学者和编辑之间的互利共赢来促进复制。我们开发了一个模型，捕捉在向期刊提交论文之前寻求独立复制所涉及的权衡。我们通过研究奈特不确定性对公共品博弈中合作率的影响来展示该方法的运作，这是文献中一个普遍但很大程度上未被探索的特征。
26801.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：A11, C18, C92, C93, D82

26800.title: Markups, Labor Market Inequality and the Nature of Work
26800.zh_title: 加成率、劳动力市场不平等与工作性质
26800.abstract: We demonstrate the importance of distinguishing between the traditional use of labor for production, versus alternative uses of labor for overhead, marketing and other expansionary activities, for studying the distribution of both factor income and labor income. We use our framework to assess the impact of changes in markups on the overall labor share and on labor income inequality across occupations. We identify the production and expansionary content of different occupations from the co-movement of occupational income shares with markup-induced changes in the labor share. We find that around one-fifth of US labor income compensates expansionary activities, and that occupations with larger expansionary content have experienced the fastest wage and employment growth since 1980. Our framework can rationalize a counter-cyclical labor share in the presence of sticky prices and can be used to study the distributional effects of demand shocks, monetary policy and secular changes in competition.
26800.zh_abstract: 我们证明了区分劳动的传统生产用途与劳动在管理费用、营销和其他扩张活动中的替代用途，对于研究要素收入和劳动收入的分配至关重要。我们利用我们的框架评估加成率变化对总体劳动份额以及跨职业劳动收入不平等的影响。我们根据职业收入份额与加成率引起的劳动份额变化的共同变动，识别不同职业的生产和扩张内容。我们发现，美国劳动收入中约五分之一用于补偿扩张活动，并且自1980年以来，扩张内容较大的职业经历了最快的工资和就业增长。我们的框架可以在存在价格粘性的情况下合理化反周期的劳动份额，并可用于研究需求冲击、货币政策和竞争长期变化对分配的影响。
26800.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME；JEL：D2, D3, D4, E3, E5, J2, L1

26844.title: Searching for STARs: Work Experience as a Job Market Signal for Workers without Bachelor's Degrees
26844.zh_title: 寻找STARs：工作经验作为无学士学位工人的就业市场信号
26844.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Tomas G. Castagnino, Erica L. Groshen, Papia Debroy, Byron Auguste, Shad Ahmed, Fernando Garcia Diaz, Cristian Bonavida
26844.abstract: The demand for a skilled workforce is increasing even faster than the supply of workers with college degrees – the result: rising wage inequality by education levels, and firms facing a skills gap. While it is often assumed that increasing the number of college graduates is required to fill this gap, this paper explores the extent to which workers without BA college degrees can help fill this gap. To find workers without BA degrees who are potentially skilled through alternative routes (STARs), we use data on the skill requirements of jobs to compute the “skill distance” between a worker’s current occupation and higher wage occupations with similar skill requirements in their local labor market. Based on our calculations, of the 16 million non-college educated workers with skills for high-wage work (> twice median earnings), 11 million whom we term “Rising STARs” are currently employed in middle-to low-wage work. We propose a general taxonomy for STARs to identify potential job transitions to higher wage work within their current earnings category and across earnings categories.
26844.zh_abstract: 对技能劳动力的需求增长甚至快于拥有大学学位的工人供给——其结果是：按教育水平划分的工资不平等加剧，以及企业面临技能缺口。虽然通常认为需要增加大学毕业生数量来填补这一缺口，但本文探讨了没有学士学位的工人在多大程度上可以帮助填补这一缺口。为了寻找可能通过替代途径获得技能的无学士学位工人（STARs），我们使用关于工作技能要求的数据，计算工人当前职业与其当地劳动力市场中具有类似技能要求的高薪职业之间的“技能距离”。根据我们的计算，在1600万拥有高薪工作（>中位收入的两倍）技能的非大学教育工人中，有1100万我们称之为“上升中的STARs”目前从事中低薪工作。我们提出了一个STARs的通用分类法，以识别在当前收入类别内和跨收入类别向更高薪工作的潜在职业转换。
26844.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：E24, I24, J11, J24, O15

26843.title: The International Market for Corporate Control
26843.zh_title: 公司控制权的国际市场
26843.abstract: This paper documents a set of stylized facts about recent trends in cross-border M&A (CBMA) activity around the world. The facts focus on key features of CBMA such as (i) the magnitude; (ii) how it varies across industries and locations; (iii) how it compares to levels of greenfield FDI over time; (iv) horizontal (market access) versus vertical (integrating supply chains) transactions; (v) the mode of financing; (vi) diversifying transactions versus those in the same industry; (vii) patterns of control acquisition; and (viii) strategic versus financially motivated transactions. The paper also examines whether the nature of cross-border M&A activity differs across developed and emerging markets. Next, it considers the incentives for firms to buy firms in other countries and to sell divisions to foreign buyers and examines the evidence about post-acquisition outcomes. The paper concludes with a discussion of policy challenges that confront governments as they weigh the balance of national security concerns against a desire to increase foreign investment in their economies.
26843.zh_abstract: 本文记录了全球跨境并购活动近期趋势的一系列典型事实。这些事实聚焦于跨境并购的关键特征，包括：(i) 规模；(ii) 在不同行业和地区的差异；(iii) 与同期绿地外商直接投资的比较；(iv) 横向（市场准入）与纵向（整合供应链）交易；(v) 融资方式；(vi) 多元化交易与同行业交易；(vii) 控制权收购模式；以及 (viii) 战略驱动交易与财务驱动交易。本文还考察了跨境并购活动的性质在发达市场和新兴市场之间是否存在差异。接着，本文探讨了企业收购其他国家企业以及向外国买家出售部门的动机，并检验了关于收购后结果的证据。最后，本文讨论了政府在权衡国家安全关切与增加经济中外商投资意愿时所面临的政策挑战。
26843.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F23, F3, G34

26842.title: How Developmental Neuroscience Can Help Address the Problem of Child Poverty
26842.zh_title: 发展神经科学如何帮助解决儿童贫困问题
26842.abstract: Nearly 1 in 5 children in the United States lives in a household whose income is below the official federal poverty line, and more than 40% of children live in poor or near-poor households. Research on the effects of poverty on children’s development has been a focus of study for many decades and is now increasing as we accumulate more evidence about the implications of poverty. The American Academy of Pediatrics recently added “Poverty and Child Health” to its Agenda for Children to recognize what has now been established as broad and enduring effects of poverty on child development. A recent addition to the field has been the application of neuroscience-based methods. Various techniques including neuroimaging, neuroendocrinology, cognitive psychophysiology, and epigenetics are beginning to document ways in which early experiences of living in poverty affect infant brain development. We discuss whether there are truly worthwhile reasons for adding neuroscience and related biological methods to study child poverty. And how might these perspectives help guide developmentally-based and targeted interventions and policies for these children and their families.
26842.zh_abstract: 美国近五分之一的儿童生活在收入低于联邦官方贫困线的家庭中，超过40%的儿童生活在贫困或接近贫困的家庭中。关于贫困对儿童发展影响的研究已成为数十年的研究焦点，并且随着我们积累更多关于贫困影响的证据，这一研究正在增加。美国儿科学会最近将“贫困与儿童健康”纳入其儿童议程，以承认贫困对儿童发展已确立的广泛而持久的影响。该领域的一个新进展是应用基于神经科学的方法。包括神经影像学、神经内分泌学、认知心理生理学和表观遗传学在内的各种技术，正开始记录早期贫困生活经历影响婴儿大脑发育的方式。我们讨论了是否有真正值得的理由将神经科学及相关生物学方法添加到儿童贫困研究中。以及这些视角如何帮助指导针对这些儿童及其家庭的、基于发展的、有针对性的干预措施和政策。

26841.title: Administrative Discretion in Scientific Funding: Evidence from a Prestigious Postdoctoral Training Program
26841.zh_title: 科学资助中的行政自由裁量权：来自一项著名博士后培训项目的证据
26841.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Misty L. Heggeness
26841.abstract: The scientific community is engaged in an active debate on the value of its peer-review system. Does peer review actually serve the role we envision for it—that of helping government agencies predict what ideas have the best chance of contributing to scientific advancement? Many federal agencies use a two-step review process that includes programmatic discretion in selecting awards. This process allows us to determine whether success in a future independent scientific-research career is more accurately predicted by peer-review recommendations or discretion by program staff and institute leaders. Using data from a prestigious training program at the National Institute of Health (NIH), the Ruth L. Kirschstein National Research Service Award (NRSA), we provide evidence on the efficacy of peer review. We find that, despite all current claims to the contrary, the existing peer-review system works as intended. It more closely predicts high-quality science and future research independence than discretion. We discover also that regression discontinuity, the econometric method typically used to examine the effect of scientific funding, does not fit many scientific-funding models and should only be used with caution when studying federal awards for science.
26841.zh_abstract: 科学界正在就其同行评审系统的价值进行积极辩论。同行评审是否真的发挥了我们设想的作用——即帮助政府机构预测哪些想法最有可能促进科学进步？许多联邦机构采用两步评审流程，其中包括在遴选资助项目时的项目自由裁量权。这一流程使我们能够确定，未来独立科研生涯的成功是由同行评审建议更准确预测，还是由项目官员和机构负责人的自由裁量权更准确预测。利用美国国立卫生研究院一项著名培训项目——Ruth L. Kirschstein国家研究服务奖的数据，我们提供了关于同行评审有效性的证据。我们发现，尽管当前有相反的说法，但现有的同行评审系统按预期运作。与自由裁量权相比，它更准确地预测了高质量科学和未来的研究独立性。我们还发现，断点回归——通常用于检验科学资助效果的计量经济学方法——并不适用于许多科学资助模型，在研究联邦科学奖项时应谨慎使用。

26840.title: Happiness and the Quality of Government
26840.authors: John F. Helliwell, Haifang Huang, Shun Wang
26840.abstract: This chapter uses happiness data to assess the quality of government. Our happiness data are drawn from the Gallup World Poll, starting in 2005 and extending to 2017 or 2018. In our analysis of the panel of more than 150 countries and generally over 1,500 national-level observations, we show that government delivery quality is significantly correlated with national happiness, but democratic quality is not. We also analyze other quality of government indicators. Confidence in government is correlated with happiness, however forms of democracy and government spending seem not. We further discuss three channels (including peace and conflict, trust, and inequality) whereby quality of government and happiness are linked. We finally summarize what has been learned about how government policies could be formed to improve citizens’ happiness.
26840.zh_abstract: 本章利用幸福感数据来评估政府质量。我们的幸福感数据来自盖洛普世界民意调查，起始于2005年，延伸至2017年或2018年。在我们对涵盖150多个国家、通常超过1500个国家级观测值的面板数据分析中，我们表明政府交付质量与国家幸福感显著相关，但民主质量则不然。我们还分析了其他政府质量指标。对政府的信心与幸福感相关，然而民主形式和政府支出似乎无关。我们进一步讨论了政府质量与幸福感相联系的三个渠道（包括和平与冲突、信任以及不平等）。最后，我们总结了关于如何制定政府政策以改善公民幸福感方面的已有认识。

26839.title: Urbanization and its Discontents
26839.abstract: American cities have experienced a remarkable renaissance over the past 40 years, but in recent years, cities have experienced considerable discontent. Anger about high housing prices and gentrification has led to protests. The urban wage premium appears to have disappeared for less skilled workers. The cities of the developing world are growing particularly rapidly, but in those places, the downsides of density are acute. In this essay, I review the causes of urban discontent and present a unified explanation for this unhappiness. Urban resurgence represents private sector success, and the public sector typically only catches up to urban change with a considerable lag. Moreover, as urban machines have been replaced by governments that are more accountable to empowered residents, urban governments do more to protect insiders and less to enable growth. The power of insiders can be seen in the regulatory limits on new construction and new businesses, the slow pace of school reform and the unwillingness to embrace congestion pricing.
26839.zh_abstract: 美国城市在过去40年经历了显著的复兴，但近年来，城市也经历了相当大的不满。对高房价和绅士化的愤怒导致了抗议活动。城市工资溢价似乎对技能较低的工人消失了。发展中国家的城市增长尤为迅速，但在这些地方，密度的负面影响十分严重。在这篇文章中，我回顾了城市不满的原因，并为这种不满提出了一个统一的解释。城市复兴代表了私营部门的成功，而公共部门通常只有在相当长的滞后之后才能赶上城市变化。此外，随着城市机器被对有权居民更负责的政府所取代，城市政府更多地保护内部人，而较少促进增长。内部人的权力体现在对新建筑和新业务的监管限制、学校改革的缓慢步伐以及不愿接受拥堵定价上。

26838.title: Rising Bank Concentration
26838.abstract: Concentration of insured deposit funding among the top four commercial banks in the U.S. has risen from 15% in 1984 to 44% in 2018, a roughly three-fold increase. Regulation has often been attributed as a factor in that increase. The Riegle-Neal Interstate Banking and Branching Efficiency Act of 1994 removed many of the restrictions on opening bank branches across state lines. We interpret the Riegle-Neal act as lowering the cost of expanding a bank's funding base. In this paper, we build an industry equilibrium model in which banks endogenously climb a funding base ladder. Rising concentration occurs along a transition path between two steady states after branching costs decline.
26838.zh_abstract: 美国前四大商业银行的受保存款资金集中度从1984年的15%上升到2018年的44%，大约增长了三倍。监管常被认为是这一增长的一个因素。1994年的《里格尔-尼尔州际银行及分行效率法案》取消了许多关于跨州开设银行分行的限制。我们将《里格尔-尼尔法案》解释为降低了扩大银行资金基础的成本。在本文中，我们构建了一个行业均衡模型，其中银行内生地攀登资金基础阶梯。在分行成本下降后，集中度上升发生在两个稳态之间的过渡路径上。
26838.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：E44, G21, L11, L13

26837.title: Gender Roles and the Gender Expectations Gap
26837.zh_title: 性别角色与性别预期差距
26837.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Ulrike Malmendier, Michael Weber
26837.abstract: Expectations about macro-finance variables, such as inflation, vary significantly across genders, even within the same household. We conjecture that traditional gender roles expose women and men to different economic signals in their daily lives, which in turn produce systematic variation in expectations. Using unique data on the contributions of men and women to household grocery chores, their resulting exposure to price signals, and their inflation expectations, we show that the gender expectations gap is tightly linked to participation in grocery shopping. We also document a gender gap in other economic expectations and discuss how it might affect economic choices.
26837.zh_abstract: 对宏观金融变量（如通货膨胀）的预期在性别之间存在显著差异，即使在同一个家庭内部也是如此。我们推测，传统的性别角色使女性和男性在日常生活中接触到不同的经济信号，这进而产生了系统性的预期差异。利用关于男性和女性在家庭杂货采购中的贡献、由此产生的对价格信号的暴露以及他们的通胀预期的独特数据，我们表明性别预期差距与参与杂货购物密切相关。我们还记录了其他经济预期中的性别差距，并讨论了它可能如何影响经济选择。
26837.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C90, D14, D84, E31, E52, G11

26836.title: Education and Health Over the Life Cycle
26836.zh_title: 生命周期中的教育与健康
26836.authors: Robert Kaestner, Cuiping Schiman, Jason M. Ward
26836.abstract: There is little theoretical and empirical research on the effects of education on health over the life cycle. In this article, we extend the Grossman (1972) model of the demand for health and use the extended model to analyze the effect of education on health at different ages. The main conclusion from our model is that it is unlikely that the relationship between education and health will be constant over the life cycle and that education is likely to have little effect on health at younger ages when there is little depreciation of the health stock. We also present an extensive empirical analysis documenting the association between education and health over the life cycle. Results of our analysis suggest that in terms of mortality, education has little effect until age 60, but then lowers the hazard rate of death. For measures of morbidity, education has an effect at most ages between 45 to 60, but after age 60 has apparently little effect most likely due to selective mortality. In addition, most of the apparent beneficial effect of education stems from obtaining a high school degree or more. It is the health and mortality of lowest education group—those with less than a high school degree—that diverges from the health and mortality of other education groups. Finally, we find that the educational differences in health have become larger for more recent birth cohorts.
26836.zh_abstract: 关于教育对生命周期健康影响的理论和实证研究很少。在本文中，我们扩展了Grossman（1972）的健康需求模型，并使用扩展模型分析了教育在不同年龄对健康的影响。我们模型的主要结论是，教育与健康之间的关系不太可能在生命周期中保持不变，并且在健康存量折旧很少的较年轻年龄，教育可能对健康影响甚微。我们还进行了广泛的实证分析，记录了教育与健康在生命周期中的关联。我们的分析结果表明，就死亡率而言，教育在60岁之前几乎没有影响，但之后会降低死亡风险率。就发病率指标而言，教育在45至60岁之间的大多数年龄有影响，但在60岁之后显然影响甚微，这很可能是由于选择性死亡率。此外，教育的大部分明显有益效果源于获得高中或以上学历。正是最低教育群体（那些未获得高中学历的人）的健康和死亡率与其他教育群体的健康和死亡率存在差异。最后，我们发现，对于较近期的出生队列，教育在健康方面的差异变得更大。

26835.title: The Effect of Open-Air Waste Burning on Infant Health: Evidence from Government Failure in Lebanon
26835.zh_title: 露天垃圾焚烧对婴儿健康的影响：来自黎巴嫩政府失灵的证据
26835.authors: Pierre Mouganie, Ruba Ajeeb, Mark Hoekstra
26835.abstract: An estimated 40 percent of the world's garbage is burned in open-air fires, which are responsible for as much as half of the global emissions of some pollutants. However, there is little evidence on the health consequences of open-air waste burning. In this paper, we estimate the effect of in utero exposure to open-air waste burning on birth outcomes. We do so by examining the consequences of the Lebanese garbage crisis of 2015, which led to an abrupt, unanticipated increase in waste burning in residential neighborhoods in Beirut and Mount Lebanon. To identify effects, we exploit variation in exposure across neighborhoods before and after the crisis. Results indicate exposure had large impacts on birth outcomes; in utero exposure to at least one open-air waste burn increased premature births by 4 percentage points (50%) and low birth weight by 5 to 8 percentage points (80 - 120%). Given previous research documenting the long-run effects of prenatal shocks on adult health, human capital, and labor market outcomes, this suggests open-air waste burning imposes significant costs on populations worldwide.
26835.zh_abstract: 据估计，全球40%的垃圾通过露天焚烧处理，这导致某些污染物的全球排放量中高达一半来自此类焚烧。然而，关于露天垃圾焚烧对健康影响的证据很少。本文估算了子宫内暴露于露天垃圾焚烧对出生结局的影响。我们通过考察2015年黎巴嫩垃圾危机的影响来实现这一目标，该危机导致贝鲁特和黎巴嫩山住宅区露天垃圾焚烧突然且意外地增加。为了识别效应，我们利用了危机前后不同社区暴露程度的变化。结果表明，暴露对出生结局有重大影响；子宫内至少经历一次露天垃圾焚烧会使早产率增加4个百分点（50%），低出生体重率增加5至8个百分点（80%至120%）。鉴于先前研究记录了产前冲击对成人健康、人力资本和劳动力市场结果的长期影响，这表明露天垃圾焚烧给全球人口带来了显著成本。

26834.title: Language Training and Refugees' Integration
26834.authors: Jacob Nielsen Arendt, Iben Bolvig, Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri
26834.abstract: We evaluate a Danish reform focused on improving Danish language training for those granted refugee status on or after January 1, 1999. Using a Regression Discontinuity Design we find a significant, permanent, positive effect on earnings. This effect emerged after completion of language classes and was accompanied by additional schooling and higher probability of working in communication-intensive jobs, suggesting that language training, rather than other minor aspects of the reform, produced it. We also find evidence of higher completion rates of lower secondary school and lower probability of crime for male children with both parents exposed to the reform.
26834.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一项丹麦改革，该改革旨在改善1999年1月1日或之后获得难民身份者的丹麦语培训。使用断点回归设计，我们发现改革对收入产生了显著且持久的正向效应。这一效应在语言课程完成后显现，并伴随着额外的教育机会以及从事沟通密集型工作概率的提高，这表明语言培训（而非改革的其他次要方面）是产生该效应的原因。我们还发现，对于父母双方都受到改革影响的男性儿童，其初中毕业率更高，犯罪概率更低。
26834.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：E64, I30, J18, J24, J60

26833.title: Robustly Optimal Monetary Policy in a New Keynesian Model with Housing
26833.zh_title: 包含住房部门的新凯恩斯模型中的稳健最优货币政策
26833.abstract: We analytically characterize optimal monetary policy for an augmented New Keynesian model with a housing sector. With rational private sector expectations about housing prices and inflation, optimal monetary policy can be characterized by a standard “target criterion” in terms of inflation and the output gap, that makes no reference to housing prices. If instead the policymaker is concerned with potential departures of private sector expectations from rational ones, and seeks a policy that is robust against such possible departures, then the optimal target criterion will also depend on housing prices. For empirically realistic cases, robustness requires the central bank to “lean against” housing prices, i.e., to adopt a stance that is projected to undershoot (overshoot) its normal targets for inflation and the output gap following unexpected housing price increases (decreases). Notably, robustly optimal policy does not require that the central bank distinguish between “fundamental” and “non-fundamental” movements in housing prices.
26833.zh_abstract: 我们解析性地刻画了包含住房部门的扩展新凯恩斯模型中的最优货币政策。在私人部门对房价和通胀具有理性预期的情况下，最优货币政策可以用一个关于通胀和产出缺口的标准“目标准则”来表征，该准则不涉及房价。然而，如果政策制定者担心私人部门预期可能偏离理性预期，并寻求一种能够抵御此类可能偏离的稳健政策，那么最优目标准则也将依赖于房价。对于经验上现实的情形，稳健性要求中央银行“逆风”干预房价，即在意外房价上涨（下跌）后，采取预计会低于（高于）其通胀和产出缺口正常目标的政策立场。值得注意的是，稳健最优政策并不要求中央银行区分房价的“基本面”和“非基本面”变动。

26832.title: Mandated Sick Pay: Coverage, Utilization, and Crowding-In
26832.zh_title: 法定病假工资：覆盖率、使用率与挤入效应
26832.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Stefan Pichler, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
26832.abstract: Using the National Compensation Survey from 2009 to 2022 and difference-in-differences methods, we find that state-level sick pay mandates are effective in broadening access for U.S. workers. Increases in coverage reach 30ppt from a 63% baseline five years post-mandate. Mandates have more bite in jobs with low pre-mandate coverage. Further, mandates reduce inequality in access to paid sick leave substantially, both across and within firms. Covid-19 reinforced existing positive trends in coverage and take-up. Sick leave use increases linearly, whereas costs plateau after five years. Finally, we find crowding-in of non-mandated benefits which we label “job upscaling” by firms to differentiate jobs and attract labor.
26832.zh_abstract: 利用2009年至2022年的全国薪酬调查数据和双重差分方法，我们发现州级病假工资强制令在扩大美国工人获取病假工资方面是有效的。在强制令实施五年后，覆盖率从63%的基线水平增加了30个百分点。强制令在强制前覆盖率较低的工作中效果更显著。此外，强制令显著减少了获取带薪病假的不平等，无论是在企业间还是企业内部。新冠疫情强化了覆盖率和使用率已有的积极趋势。带薪病假的使用呈线性增长，而成本在五年后趋于稳定。最后，我们发现了非强制福利的“挤入效应”，我们将其称为企业为差异化岗位和吸引劳动力而进行的“工作升级”。
26832.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I13, I18, J22, J28, J32

26831.title: When a Master Dies: Speculation and Asset Float
26831.zh_title: 大师离世：投机与资产流通量
26831.authors: Julien Pénasse, Luc Renneboog, José A. Scheinkman
26831.abstract: The death of an artist constitutes a negative supply shock to his future production; in finance terms, this supply shock reduces the artist's float. Intuition may thus suggest that this supply shock reduces the future auction volume of the artist. However, if collectors have fluctuating heterogeneous beliefs, since they cannot sell short, prices overweigh optimists' beliefs and have a speculative component. If collectors have limited capacity to bear risk, an increase in float may decrease subsequent turnover and prices (Hong et al. 2006). Symmetrically, a negative supply shock leads to an augmentation of prices and turnover. We find strong support for this prediction in the data on art auctions that we examine.
26831.zh_abstract: 艺术家的去世对其未来创作构成负向供给冲击；用金融术语来说，这种供给冲击减少了艺术家的流通量。直觉上，这可能意味着该供给冲击会降低艺术家未来的拍卖成交量。然而，如果收藏家具有波动的异质信念，并且由于无法卖空，价格会过度反映乐观者的信念并包含投机成分。如果收藏家承担风险的能力有限，流通量的增加可能会降低随后的换手率和价格（Hong et al. 2006）。对称地，负向供给冲击会导致价格和换手率的上升。我们在所考察的艺术品拍卖数据中找到了支持这一预测的有力证据。

26830.title: A Quantitative Analysis of Distortions in Managerial Forecasts
26830.zh_title: 管理层预测扭曲的量化分析
26830.authors: Yueran Ma, Tiziano Ropele, David Sraer, David Thesmar
26830.abstract: This paper quantifies the economic costs of distortions in managerial forecasts. We match a unique managerial survey run by the Bank of Italy with administrative data on firm balance sheets and income statements. The resulting dataset allows us to observe a long panel of managerial forecast errors for a sample of firms representative of the Italian economy. We show that managerial forecast errors are positively and significantly autocorrelated. This persistence in forecast error is consistent with managerial underreaction to new information. To quantify the economic significance of this forecasting bias, we estimate a dynamic equilibrium model with heterogeneous firms and distorted expectations. The estimated model matches not only the persistence of forecast errors, but the empirical link between investment and managerial forecasts. Relative to a counterfactual with rational expectations, we find that managers exhibit large forecasting biases, which lead to significant distortions in firm-level investment. These distortions, however, imply limited loss in firm value. In general equilibrium, the estimated model leads to negligible aggregate efficiency losses from distorted forecasts.
26830.zh_abstract: 本文量化了管理层预测扭曲的经济成本。我们将意大利银行进行的一项独特的管理层调查与关于企业资产负债表和损益表的行政数据相匹配。由此产生的数据集使我们能够观察到代表意大利经济的企业样本中管理层预测误差的长面板数据。我们表明，管理层预测误差存在正向且显著的自相关。这种预测误差的持续性与管理层对新信息反应不足是一致的。为了量化这种预测偏差的经济显著性，我们估计了一个包含异质性企业和扭曲预期的动态均衡模型。估计的模型不仅匹配了预测误差的持续性，还匹配了投资与管理层预测之间的经验联系。与理性预期的反事实相比，我们发现管理层表现出较大的预测偏差，这导致了企业层面投资的显著扭曲。然而，这些扭曲对企业价值的损失有限。在一般均衡中，估计的模型表明，由扭曲预测导致的总体效率损失可以忽略不计。
26830.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E03, E22, E7, E70, E71, G02, G3, G31

26829.title: Convex Supply Curves
26829.abstract: We provide evidence that industries' supply curves are convex. To guide our empirical analysis, we develop a putty-clay model in which capacity constraints at the plant level generate convex supply curves at the industry level. The model's key insight is that an industry's capacity utilization rate is a sufficient statistic for the slope of its supply curve. Using data on capacity utilization and three different instruments, we estimate the supply curve and find robust evidence for convexity. Supply curves are essentially flat at low levels of capacity utilization but increasing at higher levels. Further, industries with low initial capacity utilization rates expand production twice as much after demand shocks as industries that produce close to their capacity limit. The nonlinearity we identify has a number of macroeconomic implications, including that responses to shocks are state-dependent, that the Phillips curve is convex, and that the welfare costs of business cycles are larger than in Lucas (1987).
26829.zh_abstract: 我们提供了行业供给曲线是凸性的证据。为了指导我们的实证分析，我们开发了一个“油灰-粘土”模型，在该模型中，工厂层面的产能约束产生了行业层面的凸性供给曲线。该模型的关键见解是，行业的产能利用率是其供给曲线斜率的充分统计量。利用产能利用率数据和三种不同的工具变量，我们估计了供给曲线，并发现了支持凸性的稳健证据。供给曲线在低产能利用率水平下基本平坦，但在较高水平下则呈上升趋势。此外，初始产能利用率较低的行业在需求冲击后，其产量扩张幅度是接近产能极限行业的两倍。我们识别出的这种非线性具有若干宏观经济含义，包括：对冲击的反应是状态依赖的，菲利普斯曲线是凸性的，以及经济周期的福利成本大于Lucas（1987）的估计。
26829.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E22, E32, E52, E62, F44

26828.title: Market Fragmentation
26828.abstract: We model a simple market setting in which fragmentation of trade of the same asset across multiple exchanges improves allocative efficiency. Fragmentation reduces the inhibiting effect of price-impact avoidance on order submission. Although fragmentation reduces market depth on each exchange, it also isolates cross-exchange price impacts, leading to more aggressive overall order submission and better rebalancing of unwanted positions across traders. Fragmentation also has implications for the extent to which prices reveal traders’ private information. While a given exchange price is less informative in more fragmented markets, all exchange prices taken together are more informative.
26828.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个简单的市场模型，在该模型中，同一资产在多个交易所进行碎片化交易可以提高配置效率。碎片化减少了避免价格冲击对订单提交的抑制作用。尽管碎片化降低了每个交易所的市场深度，但它也隔离了跨交易所的价格冲击，从而导致整体订单提交更加激进，并更好地在交易者之间重新平衡非意愿头寸。碎片化还对价格揭示交易者私人信息的程度产生影响。虽然单个交易所的价格在更碎片化的市场中信息含量更低，但所有交易所价格的总和却更具信息含量。

26827.title: The Structure of Multinational Firms' International Activities
26827.zh_title: 跨国企业国际活动的结构
26827.authors: Ronald B. Davies, James R. Markusen
26827.abstract: The structure of a multinational firm, that is how its affiliates relate to one another, is critical for understanding where multinationals locate, how policy affects them, and their resilience to localized shocks. Here, we review the two main structures: horizontal investments which replicate activities across borders, and vertical investments which fragment activities across countries. In addition, we use data (primarily from the US) to examine which of these structures seems to dominate the data. This includes a novel use of measures of global value-chain positioning of a country's industries. In each case, the data suggests a dominant role for horizontal investment. We conclude with a discussion of the challenge that intangibles play in multinational data and point towards potentially fertile areas for future research.
26827.zh_abstract: 跨国企业的结构，即其子公司之间的相互关系，对于理解跨国公司的区位选择、政策如何影响它们以及它们对局部冲击的抵御能力至关重要。在此，我们回顾两种主要结构：横向投资，即跨国复制活动；以及纵向投资，即跨国分散活动。此外，我们利用数据（主要来自美国）来检验这些结构中哪一种似乎在数据中占主导地位。这包括对一国产业全球价值链定位指标的新颖运用。在每种情况下，数据都表明横向投资起着主导作用。最后，我们讨论了无形资产在跨国数据中带来的挑战，并指出了未来研究可能富有成果的领域。

26826.title: Online Estimation of DSGE Models
26826.authors: Michael D. Cai, Marco Del Negro, Edward P. Herbst, Ethan Matlin, Reca Sarfati, Frank Schorfheide
26826.abstract: This paper illustrates the usefulness of sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods in approximating DSGE model posterior distributions. We show how the tempering schedule can be chosen adaptively, document the accuracy and runtime benefits of generalized data tempering for “online” estimation (that is, re-estimating a model as new data become available), and provide examples of multimodal posteriors that are well captured by SMC methods. We then use the online estimation of the DSGE model to compute pseudo-out-of-sample density forecasts and study the sensitivity of the predictive performance to changes in the prior distribution. We find that making priors less informative (compared to the benchmark priors used in the literature) by increasing the prior variance does not lead to a deterioration of forecast accuracy.
26826.zh_abstract: 本文阐述了序贯蒙特卡洛方法在近似DSGE模型后验分布方面的实用性。我们展示了如何自适应地选择退火计划，记录了广义数据退火在“在线”估计（即随着新数据的出现重新估计模型）中的准确性和运行时间优势，并提供了SMC方法能够很好捕捉的多峰后验分布示例。然后，我们利用DSGE模型的在线估计来计算伪样本外密度预测，并研究预测性能对先验分布变化的敏感性。我们发现，与文献中使用的基准先验相比，通过增加先验方差使先验信息减少，并不会导致预测准确性的下降。
26826.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C53, E32, E37, E52

26825.title: Terrorist Attacks, Cultural Incidents and the Vote for Radical Parties: Analyzing Text from Twitter
26825.zh_title: 恐怖袭击、文化事件与激进政党投票：基于Twitter文本分析
26825.authors: Francesco Giavazzi, Felix Iglhaut, Giacomo Lemoli, Gaia Rubera
26825.abstract: We study the role of perceived threats from other cultures induced by terrorist attacks and by a criminal event on public discourse and voters’ support for radical right parties. We first develop a rule which allocates Twitter users in Germany to electoral districts and then use a machine learning method to compute measures of textual similarity between the tweets they produce and tweets by accounts of the main German parties. Using the dates of the exogenous events we estimate constituency-level shifts in similarity to party language. We find that following these events Twitter text becomes on average more similar to that of the main radical right party, AfD, while the opposite happens for other parties. Regressing estimated shifts in similarity on changes in vote shares between federal elections we find a significant association. Our results point to the role of perceived threats from other cultures on the success of nationalist parties.
26825.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由恐怖袭击和犯罪事件引发的对其他文化的感知威胁，对公共话语以及选民对极右翼政党支持的影响。我们首先制定了一个规则，将德国Twitter用户分配到选区，然后使用机器学习方法计算他们发布的推文与德国主要政党账户推文之间的文本相似度度量。利用外生事件的发生日期，我们估计了选区层面与政党语言相似度的变化。我们发现，在这些事件发生后，Twitter文本平均而言变得更类似于主要极右翼政党AfD的文本，而其他政党则出现相反情况。将估计的相似度变化与联邦选举间投票份额的变化进行回归，我们发现存在显著关联。我们的结果指出了感知到的其他文化威胁对民族主义政党成功的作用。

26824.title: A Model of Scientific Communication
26824.abstract: We propose a positive model of empirical science in which an analyst makes a report to an audience after observing some data. Agents in the audience may differ in their beliefs or objectives, and may therefore update or act differently following a given report. We contrast the proposed model with a classical model of statistics in which the report directly determines the payoff. We identify settings in which the predictions of the proposed model differ from those of the classical model, and seem to better match practice.
26824.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个实证科学的实证模型，其中分析人员在观察一些数据后向受众提交报告。受众中的个体可能在信念或目标上存在差异，因此可能会根据给定的报告进行不同的更新或采取不同的行动。我们将所提出的模型与一个经典的统计学模型进行对比，在经典模型中，报告直接决定收益。我们确定了所提出模型的预测与经典模型预测不同的情境，并且这些情境似乎更符合实践。

26823.title: Risks to Human Capital
26823.abstract: What is the connection between financing constraints and the equity premium? To answer this question, we build a model with inalienable human capital, in which investors finance individuals who can potentially become skilled. Though investment in skill is always optimal, it does not take place in some states of the world, due to moral hazard. In other states of the world, individuals acquire skill; however outside investors and individuals inefficiently share risk. We show that this simple moral hazard problem and the resultant financing friction leads to a realistic equity premium, a low riskfree rate, and severe negative consequences for distribution of wealth and for welfare. When investment fails to take place, the economy enters an endogenous disaster state. We show that the possibility of these disaster states distorts risk prices, even under calibrations in which they never occur in equilibrium.
26823.zh_abstract: 融资约束与股权溢价之间有何联系？为了回答这个问题，我们构建了一个包含不可转让人力资本的模型，其中投资者为可能成为技能型人才的个体提供融资。尽管投资于技能总是最优的，但由于道德风险，在某些世界状态下这种投资不会发生。在其他世界状态下，个体获得技能；然而，外部投资者和个体之间无法有效分担风险。我们表明，这种简单的道德风险问题以及由此产生的融资摩擦，导致了现实的股权溢价、低无风险利率，并对财富分配和福利产生了严重的负面影响。当投资未能发生时，经济会进入一个内生的灾难状态。我们表明，即使在校准中这些灾难状态在均衡中从未发生，它们发生的可能性也会扭曲风险价格。

26822.title: The Effects of Professor Gender on the Post-Graduation Outcomes of Female Students
26822.zh_title: 教授性别对女学生毕业后结果的影响
26822.authors: Hani Mansour, Daniel I. Rees, Bryson M. Rintala, Nathan N. Wozny
26822.abstract: Although women earn approximately 50 percent of science, technology, engineering and math (STEM) bachelor’s degrees, more than 70 percent of scientists and engineers are men. We explore a potential determinant of this STEM gender gap using newly collected data on the career trajectories of United States Air Force Academy students. Specifically, we examine the effects of being assigned female math and science professors on occupation choice and postgraduate education. We find that, among high-ability female students, being assigned a female professor leads to substantial increases in the probability of working in a STEM occupation and the probability of receiving a STEM master’s degree.
26822.zh_abstract: 尽管女性获得了大约50%的科学、技术、工程和数学学士学位，但超过70%的科学家和工程师是男性。我们利用新收集的美国空军学院学生职业轨迹数据，探讨了STEM性别差距的一个潜在决定因素。具体而言，我们研究了被分配女性数学和科学教授对职业选择及研究生教育的影响。我们发现，在高能力女学生中，被分配女性教授会显著增加其在STEM职业工作的概率以及获得STEM硕士学位的概率。

26821.title: Winners and Losers? The Effect of Gaining and Losing Access to Selective Colleges on Education and Labor Market Outcomes
26821.zh_title: 赢家与输家？获得与失去选择性大学入学机会对教育和劳动力市场结果的影响
26821.authors: Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Jesse Rothstein
26821.abstract: Selective college admissions are fundamentally a question of tradeoffs: Given capacity, admitting one student means rejecting another. Research to date has generally estimated average effects of college selectivity, and has been unable to distinguish between the effects on students gaining access and on those losing access under alternative admissions policies. We use the introduction of the Top Ten Percent rule and administrative data from the State of Texas to estimate the effect of access to a selective college on student graduation and earnings outcomes. We estimate separate effects on two groups of students. The first--highly ranked students at schools which previously sent few students to the flagship university--gain access due to the policy; the second--students outside the top tier at traditional “feeder” high schools--tend to lose access. We find that students in the first group see increases in college enrollment and graduation with some evidence of positive earnings gains 7-9 years after college. In contrast, students in the second group attend less selective colleges but do not see declines in overall college enrollment, graduation, or earnings. The Top Ten Percent rule, introduced for equity reasons, thus also seems to have improved efficiency.
26821.zh_abstract: 选择性大学招生本质上是一个权衡问题：在容量给定的情况下，录取一名学生意味着拒绝另一名学生。迄今为止的研究通常估计了大学选择性的平均效应，并且无法区分对在替代招生政策下获得入学机会的学生和失去入学机会的学生的影响。我们利用德克萨斯州“前10%规则”的引入和行政数据，来估计进入选择性大学对学生毕业和收入结果的影响。我们分别估计了对两组学生的影响。第一组——来自以前很少向旗舰大学输送学生的学校的高排名学生——因该政策而获得入学机会；第二组——来自传统“生源”高中非顶尖层级的学生——往往失去入学机会。我们发现，第一组学生的大学入学率和毕业率有所提高，并有证据表明在大学毕业7-9年后收入有所增加。相比之下，第二组学生进入了选择性较低的大学，但在整体大学入学率、毕业率或收入方面并未出现下降。因此，出于公平原因而引入的“前10%规则”似乎也提高了效率。

26820.title: Capital Flows, Real Estate, and Local Cycles: Evidence from German Cities, Banks, and Firms
26820.zh_title: 资本流动、房地产与地方周期：来自德国城市、银行和企业的证据
26820.authors: Peter Bednarek, Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
26820.abstract: We study how an aggregate bank flow shock impacts German cities' GDP growth depending on the state of their local real estate markets. Identification exploits a policy framework assigning refugees to cities on a quasi-random basis and variation in non-developable area for the construction of a measure of exposure to local real estate market tightness. We estimate that the German cities most exposed to real estate market pressure grew 2.5-5.0 percentage points more than the least exposed ones, cumulatively, during the 2009-2014 period. Bank flow shocks shift credit to firms with more collateral. More collateral also leads firms to hire and invest more in response to these shocks.
26820.zh_abstract: 我们研究了总体银行资本流动冲击如何根据当地房地产市场的状况影响德国城市的GDP增长。识别策略利用了将难民准随机分配到城市的政策框架，以及用于构建当地房地产市场紧张程度暴露度度量的不可开发区域的变化。我们估计，在2009-2014年期间，受房地产市场压力影响最大的德国城市，其累计增长率比受影响最小的城市高出2.5-5.0个百分点。银行资本流动冲击将信贷转向拥有更多抵押品的企业。更多的抵押品也促使企业针对这些冲击增加招聘和投资。
26820.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：D22, D53, E22, E3, E44, F3, G01, G15, G21, R3

26819.title: Black-Friendly Businesses in Cities During the Civil Rights Era
26819.zh_title: 民权时代城市中的黑人友好型企业
26819.authors: Maggie E.C. Jones, Trevon D. Logan, David Rosé, Lisa D. Cook
26819.abstract: Quantitative analysis of Black business districts and evidence on the magnitude of social change leading up to the passage of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, in particular as it relates to the accessibility of public accommodations, is limited. We combine newly digitized data on the precise geocoded location of nearly 6,000 Green Book establishments—public accommodations that were friendly towards African American clientele—across major urban areas with existing and new sources of data on social change to understand the dynamics of Black-friendly businesses within cities during the middle of the twentieth century. In doing so, we document a new set of facts. First, we show that the location and growth of Green Book establishments responded to economic forces. Second, we show that there was a large increase in the number of Green Book establishments in cities between 1939 and 1955. Third, for Green Book establishments located in cities for which the Home Owner’s Loan Corporation (HOLC) drew residential security maps, the vast majority (nearly 70 percent) were located in the lowest-grade, redlined neighborhoods. And finally, we show that 1950s urban renewal projects were related to the contraction of non-discriminatory businesses. Collectively, these facts suggest that more research on Black-owned and Black-friendly businesses is needed to fully understand the economics of urban change in the twentieth century.
26819.zh_abstract: 关于黑人商业区的定量分析以及导致1964年《民权法案》通过的社会变革规模（特别是与公共场所可及性相关的方面）的证据十分有限。我们将新近数字化的近6000家《绿皮书》场所（即对非洲裔美国顾客友好的公共场所）在大城市区域内的精确地理编码位置数据，与关于社会变革的现有及新数据源相结合，以理解20世纪中期城市内部黑人友好型企业的动态。在此过程中，我们记录了一系列新的事实。首先，我们表明《绿皮书》场所的位置和增长对经济力量做出了反应。其次，我们表明在1939年至1955年间，城市中《绿皮书》场所的数量大幅增加。第三，对于位于房主贷款公司（HOLC）绘制了住宅安全地图的城市中的《绿皮书》场所，绝大多数（近70%）位于评级最低的红线区。最后，我们表明20世纪50年代的城市更新项目与非歧视性企业的收缩有关。总体而言，这些事实表明，需要更多关于黑人拥有和黑人友好型企业的研究，才能充分理解20世纪城市变革的经济学。

26818.title: The Long-lasting Effects of Living under Communism on Attitudes towards Financial Markets
26818.zh_title: 共产主义生活经历对金融市场态度的长期影响
26818.authors: Christine Laudenbach, Ulrike Malmendier, Alexandra Niessen-Ruenzi
26818.abstract: We analyze the long-term effects of living under communism and its anticapitalist doctrine on households’ financial investment decisions and attitudes towards financial markets. Utilizing comprehensive German brokerage data and bank data, we show that, decades after Reunification, East Germans still invest significantly less in the stock market than West Germans. Consistent with communist friends-and-foes propaganda, East Germans are more likely to hold stocks of companies from communist countries (China, Russia, Vietnam) and of state-owned companies, and are unlikely to invest in American companies and the financial industry. Effects are stronger for individuals exposed to positive “emotional tagging,” e.g., those living in celebrated showcase cities. Effects reverse for individuals with negative experiences, e.g., environmental pollution, religious oppression, or lack of (Western) TV entertainment. Election years trigger further divergence of East and West Germans. We provide evidence of negative welfare consequences due to less diversified portfolios, higher-fee products, and lower risk-adjusted returns.
26818.zh_abstract: 我们分析了生活在共产主义及其反资本主义教义下对家庭金融投资决策和金融市场态度的长期影响。利用全面的德国经纪数据和银行数据，我们表明，在统一数十年后，东德人投资股市的规模仍显著低于西德人。与共产主义的“朋友与敌人”宣传一致，东德人更倾向于持有来自共产主义国家（中国、俄罗斯、越南）的公司股票以及国有企业的股票，而不太可能投资于美国公司和金融业。这种效应在受到积极“情感标签”影响的个体中更强，例如那些生活在备受赞誉的示范城市中的人。而对于有负面经历（如环境污染、宗教压迫或缺乏西方电视娱乐）的个体，这种效应则发生逆转。选举年份会进一步加剧东德人和西德人的分化。我们提供了证据，表明由于投资组合多元化不足、选择费用更高的产品以及风险调整后收益较低，这导致了负面的福利后果。
26818.meta: Programs：AG, CF, POL；JEL：D03, D14, D83, D84, E21, G11

26817.title: Perceived Precautionary Savings Motives: Evidence from FinTech
26817.zh_title: 感知的预防性储蓄动机：来自金融科技的证据
26817.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Thomas Rauter, Christoph K. Scheuch, Michael Weber
26817.abstract: We study the spending response of first-time borrowers to an overdraft facility and elicit their preferences, beliefs, and motives through a FinTech application. Users increase their spending permanently, lower their savings rate, and reallocate spending from non-discretionary to discretionary goods. Interestingly, liquid users react more than others but do not tap into negative deposits. The credit line acts as a form of insurance. These results are not fully consistent with models of financial constraints, buffer stock models, or present-bias preferences. We label this channel perceived precautionary savings motives: Liquid users behave as if they faced strong precautionary savings motives even though no observables, including elicited preferences and beliefs, suggest they should.
26817.zh_abstract: 我们研究了首次借款者对透支服务的支出反应，并通过金融科技应用程序获取了他们的偏好、信念和动机。用户永久性地增加了支出，降低了储蓄率，并将支出从非 discretionary 商品重新分配至 discretionary 商品。有趣的是，流动性充裕的用户反应比其他用户更大，但并未动用负存款。信用额度起到了一种保险形式的作用。这些结果并不完全符合金融约束模型、缓冲库存模型或现时偏差偏好的预测。我们将这一渠道称为感知的预防性储蓄动机：流动性充裕的用户表现得好像他们面临着强烈的预防性储蓄动机，尽管没有任何可观测因素（包括所获取的偏好和信念）表明他们应该如此。
26817.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, E21, E51, G21, G51

26816.title: A Model of Cryptocurrencies
26816.abstract: We model a cryptocurrency as membership in a decentralized digital platform developed to facilitate transactions between users of certain goods or services. The rigidity induced by the cryptocurrency price having to clear membership demand with supply of token by speculators, especially with strong complementarity in membership demand, can lead to market breakdown. While user optimism mitigates the market fragility by increasing user participation, speculator sentiment exacerbates it by crowding users out. Informational frictions attenuate the risk of breakdown by dampening price volatility and platform performance. Furthermore, the users' anticipation of losses from strategic attacks by miners exacerbates the market fragility.
26816.zh_abstract: 我们将加密货币建模为去中心化数字平台的会员资格，该平台旨在促进特定商品或服务用户之间的交易。加密货币价格必须使会员需求与投机者的代币供给相平衡，这种刚性，尤其是在会员需求存在强互补性的情况下，可能导致市场崩溃。虽然用户乐观情绪通过增加用户参与来缓解市场脆弱性，但投机者情绪通过挤出用户而加剧了市场脆弱性。信息摩擦通过抑制价格波动和平台表现来降低崩溃风险。此外，用户对来自矿工策略性攻击的损失预期加剧了市场脆弱性。

26815.title: Issuance Overpricing of China’s Corporate Debt Securities
26815.zh_title: 中国公司信用债的发行溢价
26815.authors: Yi Ding, Wei Xiong, Jinfan Zhang
26815.abstract: We document issuance overpricing of corporate debt securities in China, which contrasts with underpricing of equity and debt securities in Western countries. The phenomenon in China is robust across subsamples of issuances with different credit ratings, maturities, issuer types, and issuing history, reflecting the distinct institutional environment and issuance process in China’s market for corporate debt securities. The average overpricing dropped from 7.44 basis points to 2.41 basis points after the government prohibited underwriters from using rebates in issuances in October 2017. By analyzing overpricing before and after the rebate ban and across different issuers and underwriters, we uncover two channels for underwriters, who compete for future underwriting business, to drive up overpricing: rebates and self-purchases.
26815.zh_abstract: 我们记录了中国公司信用债的发行溢价现象，这与西方国家股权和债务证券的折价发行形成对比。中国的这一现象在不同信用评级、期限、发行人类型和发行历史的分样本中均稳健存在，反映了中国公司信用债市场独特的制度环境和发行流程。在2017年10月政府禁止承销商在发行中使用返点后，平均溢价从7.44个基点下降至2.41个基点。通过分析返点禁令前后以及不同发行人和承销商之间的溢价情况，我们揭示了承销商（为争夺未来承销业务而竞争）推高溢价的两种渠道：返点和自购。

26814.title: Contingent Linear Financial Networks
26814.authors: Bomin Jiang, Roberto Rigobon, Munther A. Dahleh
26814.abstract: In this paper, we develop a methodology to estimate hidden linear networks when only an aggregate outcome is observed. The aggregate observable variable is a linear mixture of the different networks and it is assumed that each network corresponds to the transmission mechanism of different shocks. We implement the methodology to estimate financial networks among US financial institutions. Credit Default Swap rates are the observable variable and we show that more than one network is needed to understand the dynamic behavior exhibited in the data.
26814.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们开发了一种方法，用于在仅观察到总体结果时估计隐藏的线性网络。可观测的总体变量是不同网络的线性混合，并且假设每个网络对应于不同冲击的传导机制。我们应用该方法来估计美国金融机构之间的金融网络。信用违约互换利率是可观测变量，我们表明需要不止一个网络才能理解数据中呈现的动态行为。

26862.title: Fiscal Federalism and the Budget Impacts of the Affordable Care Act's Medicaid Expansion
26862.zh_title: 财政联邦主义与《平价医疗法案》医疗补助扩展的预算影响
26862.abstract: Medicaid’s federal-state matching system of financing is the nation’s largest example of fiscal federalism. Using generous federal subsidies, the Affordable Care Act incentivized states to expand Medicaid, which became a state option in the aftermath of a 2012 Supreme Court ruling. As of early 2020, 14 states had not yet expanded, with concerns over state budgetary effects described as a key barrier. We use an event-study approach to analyze state budget data from 2010-2018 and assess the effects of state Medicaid expansion decisions. We find that Medicaid expansion increased total spending in expansion states by 6% to 9%, compared to non-expansion states. By source of funds, federal spending via the states increased by 10% in the first year of Medicaid expansion, rising to 27% in 2018. Changes in spending from state funding were modest and non-significant, with less than a 1% change from baseline annually in the most recent years, 2017 and 2018. Meanwhile, we find no evidence that increased Medicaid spending from expansion produced any reductions in spending on education, corrections, transportation, or public assistance. Changes in Medicaid spending tracked closely with the baseline pre-ACA (2013) uninsured rate in each states, with expansion leading to roughly $\$2680$ in added annual spending per uninsured adult. As a result, we estimate states that didn’t expand Medicaid passed up $\$43$ billion in federally-subsidized program funds in 2018. Finally, state projections in the aggregate were reasonably accurate, with expansion states projecting average Medicaid spending from 2014-2018 within 2 percent of the actual amounts, and in fact overestimating Medicaid spending in most years.
26862.zh_abstract: 医疗补助的联邦-州匹配融资体系是美国财政联邦主义的最大范例。通过慷慨的联邦补贴，《平价医疗法案》激励各州扩大医疗补助范围，但在2012年最高法院裁决后，这成为各州的选择。截至2020年初，仍有14个州未进行扩展，其中对州预算影响的担忧被描述为一个关键障碍。我们采用事件研究方法分析2010年至2018年的州预算数据，评估各州医疗补助扩展决策的影响。我们发现，与非扩展州相比，医疗补助扩展使扩展州的总支出增加了6%至9%。按资金来源划分，在医疗补助扩展的第一年，通过各州支出的联邦资金增加了10%，到2018年上升至27%。来自州资金的支出变化幅度较小且不显著，在最近的2017年和2018年，每年相对于基线的变化不到1%。同时，我们没有发现证据表明，因扩展而增加的医疗补助支出导致了教育、矫正、交通或公共援助支出的减少。医疗补助支出的变化与各州在ACA实施前（2013年）的基线未参保率密切相关，扩展导致每位未参保成年人每年增加约2680美元的支出。因此，我们估计，未扩展医疗补助的州在2018年放弃了430亿美元的联邦补贴项目资金。最后，各州的总体预测相当准确，扩展州预测的2014年至2018年平均医疗补助支出与实际金额相差在2%以内，并且在大多数年份实际上高估了医疗补助支出。

26861.title: Reasonable Doubt: Experimental Detection of Job-Level Employment Discrimination
26861.zh_title: 合理怀疑：职位层面就业歧视的实验检测
26861.authors: Patrick M. Kline, Christopher R. Walters
26861.abstract: This paper develops methods for detecting discrimination by individual employers using correspondence experiments that send fictitious resumes to real job openings. We establish identification of higher moments of the distribution of job-level callback rates as a function of the number of resumes sent to each job and propose shape-constrained estimators of these moments. Applying our methods to three experimental datasets, we find striking job-level heterogeneity in the extent to which callback probabilities differ by race or sex. Estimates of higher moments reveal that while most jobs barely discriminate, a few discriminate heavily. These moment estimates are then used to bound the share of jobs that discriminate and the posterior probability that each individual job is engaged in discrimination. In a recent experiment manipulating racially distinctive names, we find that at least 85% of jobs that contact both of two white applications and neither of two black applications are engaged in discrimination. To assess the potential value of our methods for regulators, we consider the accuracy of decision rules for investigating suspicious callback behavior in various experimental designs under a simple two-type model that rationalizes the experimental data. Though we estimate that only 17% of employers discriminate on the basis of race, we find that an experiment sending 10 applications to each job would enable detection of 7-10% of discriminatory jobs while yielding Type I error rates below 0.2%. A minimax decision rule acknowledging partial identification of the distribution of callback rates yields only slightly fewer investigations than a Bayes decision rule based on the two-type model. These findings suggest illegal labor market discrimination can be reliably monitored with relatively small modifications to existing correspondence designs.
26861.zh_abstract: 本文开发了通过向真实职位空缺发送虚构简历的通信实验来检测单个雇主歧视的方法。我们建立了职位层面回调率分布高阶矩的识别条件，并提出了这些矩的形状约束估计量。将我们的方法应用于三个实验数据集，我们发现，在种族或性别方面回调概率差异的程度存在显著的职位层面异质性。高阶矩的估计显示，虽然大多数职位几乎不存在歧视，但少数职位存在严重歧视。这些矩估计随后被用于界定存在歧视的职位比例，以及每个单个职位参与歧视的后验概率。在最近一个操纵种族特征姓名的实验中，我们发现，在联系了两名白人申请者但未联系任何一名黑人申请者的职位中，至少有85%存在歧视。为了评估我们的方法对监管机构的潜在价值，我们考虑在一个能够合理化实验数据的简单双类型模型下，各种实验设计中用于调查可疑回调行为的决策规则的准确性。尽管我们估计只有17%的雇主存在基于种族的歧视，但我们发现，一个向每个职位发送10份申请的实验，能够检测出7%至10%的歧视性职位，同时将第一类错误率控制在0.2%以下。一个承认回调率分布部分识别的极小化极大决策规则，其调查数量仅略少于基于双类型模型的贝叶斯决策规则。这些发现表明，通过对现有通信设计进行相对较小的修改，可以可靠地监测非法的劳动力市场歧视。
26861.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C14, C44, C9, J7, J71, K31, K42

26860.title: Immigration and Worker-Firm Matching
26860.abstract: The process of matching between firms and workers is an important mechanism in determining the distribution of wages. In a labor market characterised by large dispersion of workers' productivity and worker-firm complementarity, high quality firms have strong incentives to screen for the quality of workers. This process will increase the positive quality association of firm-worker matches known as positive assortative matching (PAM). Immigration in a local labor market, by increasing the variance of workers abilities, may drive stronger PAM between firms and workers. Using French matched employer-employee (DADS) data over the period 1995-2005 we document that positive supply-driven changes of immigrant workers in a district increased the strength of PAM. We then show that this association is consistent with causality, is quantitatively significant, and is associated with higher average productivity and firm profits, but also with higher wage dispersion. We also show that the increased degree of positive assortative matching is mainly reached by high-productive firms "losing" lower quality workers and "attracting" higher quality workers.
26860.zh_abstract: 企业与工人之间的匹配过程是决定工资分布的重要机制。在工人生产力高度分散且存在工人-企业互补性的劳动力市场中，高质量企业有强烈动机筛选工人质量。这一过程将增强企业与工人之间正向的质量关联，即正向分类匹配（PAM）。本地劳动力市场的移民通过增加工人能力的方差，可能推动企业与工人之间更强的PAM。利用1995-2005年法国匹配的雇主-雇员（DADS）数据，我们记录了某地区移民工人的正向供给驱动变化增强了PAM的强度。随后，我们表明这种关联与因果关系一致，在数量上显著，并与更高的平均生产率和企业利润相关，但也与更高的工资分散度相关。我们还表明，正向分类匹配程度的提高主要通过高生产率企业“失去”低质量工人并“吸引”高质量工人来实现。
26860.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F22, J24, L25

26859.title: Contagion of Fear
26859.abstract: The Great Depression is infamous for banking panics, which were a symptomatic of a phenomenon that scholars have labeled a contagion of fear. Using geocoded, microdata on bank distress, we develop metrics that illuminate the incidence of these events and how banks that remained in operation after panics responded. We show that between 1929-32 banking panics reduced lending by 13%, relative to its 1929 value, and the money multiplier and money supply by 36%. The banking panics, in other words, caused about 41% of the decline in bank lending and about nine-tenths of the decline in the money multiplier during the Great Depression.
26859.zh_abstract: 大萧条因银行恐慌而臭名昭著，这些恐慌是学者们称为“恐惧传染”现象的症状。利用地理编码的银行困境微观数据，我们开发了衡量这些事件发生率以及恐慌后仍在运营的银行如何应对的指标。我们表明，在1929年至1932年间，银行恐慌使贷款相对于1929年水平减少了13%，并使货币乘数和货币供应量减少了36%。换句话说，银行恐慌导致了大萧条期间银行贷款下降的约41%以及货币乘数下降的约十分之九。

26858.title: Wandering Astray: Teenagers' Choices of Schooling and Crime
26858.zh_title: 误入歧途：青少年的上学与犯罪选择
26858.authors: Chao Fu, Nicolás Grau, Jorge Rivera
26858.abstract: We build and estimate a dynamic model of teenagers' choices of schooling and crime, incorporating four factors that may contribute to the different routes taken by different teenagers: heterogeneous endowments, unequal opportunities, uncertainties about one's own ability, and contemporaneous shocks. We estimate the model using administrative panel data from Chile that link school records with juvenile criminal records. Counterfactual policy experiments suggest that, for teenagers with disadvantaged backgrounds, interventions that combine mild improvement in their schooling opportunities with free tuition (by adding 22 USD per enrollee-year to the existing voucher) would lead to an 11% decrease in the fraction of those ever arrested by age 18 and a 17% increase in the fraction of those consistently enrolled throughout primary and secondary education.
26858.zh_abstract: 我们构建并估计了一个关于青少年上学与犯罪选择的动态模型，纳入了可能导致不同青少年走上不同道路的四个因素：异质性禀赋、不平等机会、对自身能力的不确定性以及同期冲击。我们利用智利的行政面板数据（将学校记录与青少年犯罪记录相关联）来估计该模型。反事实政策实验表明，对于背景不利的青少年，将适度改善其上学机会与免费学费相结合的干预措施（在现有代金券基础上为每位入学学生每年增加22美元），将使18岁前曾被逮捕的青少年比例降低11%，并使在小学和中学教育期间持续入学的比例提高17%。

26857.title: Popular Economic Narratives Advancing the Longest U.S. Economic Expansion 2009-2019
26857.zh_title: 推动2009-2019年美国最长经济扩张的流行经济叙事
26857.abstract: The U.S. economic expansion since 2009 is the longest on record since 1854, according to the National Bureau of Economic Research Business Cycle Dating Committee. This paper seeks to understand this phenomenon better by looking at the time paths of popular narratives over this interval, of stories that people have been telling that offer clues into their economic behavior. Six constellations of narratives are studied, identified by keywords “Great Depression,” “secular stagnation,” “sustainability,” “housing bubble,” “strong economy,” and “save more.”
26857.zh_abstract: 根据美国国家经济研究局商业周期测定委员会的数据，自2009年以来的美国经济扩张是自1854年以来有记录以来最长的一次。本文试图通过考察这一时期流行叙事的时间路径来更好地理解这一现象，这些叙事是人们讲述的故事，为他们的经济行为提供了线索。研究了六组叙事群，分别由关键词“大萧条”、“长期停滞”、“可持续性”、“房地产泡沫”、“强劲经济”和“增加储蓄”来识别。

26856.title: Measuring the Cost of Regulation: A Text-Based Approach
26856.zh_title: 衡量监管成本：一种基于文本的方法
26856.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Harry Mamaysky, Ruoke Yang
26856.abstract: We derive a measure of firm-level regulatory exposure from the text of corporate earnings calls. We use this measure to study the effect of regulation on companies’ growth, leverage, profitability, and equity returns. Higher regulatory exposure results in slower sales and asset growth, lower leverage, reduced profitability, but higher post-call equity returns. These effects are mitigated for larger firms. Our findings suggest that both compliance risk and physical operational cost are consequences of increased regulation, but the magnitude of the effects of compliance risk are larger. The topical context of regulation is important for future firm-level outcomes.
26856.zh_abstract: 我们从企业财报电话会议的文本中推导出一个衡量企业层面监管暴露度的指标。我们使用该指标来研究监管对公司增长、杠杆率、盈利能力和股票回报的影响。更高的监管暴露度导致销售和资产增长放缓、杠杆率降低、盈利能力下降，但电话会议后的股票回报更高。这些影响对于大公司而言有所缓解。我们的发现表明，合规风险和实际运营成本都是监管加强的后果，但合规风险的影响幅度更大。监管的主题背景对于未来的企业层面结果很重要。
26856.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, POL；JEL：G18, G38, K2, L51

26855.title: Redrawing the Map of Global Capital Flows: The Role of Cross-Border Financing and Tax Havens
26855.zh_title: 重绘全球资本流动地图：跨境融资与避税天堂的作用
26855.authors: Antonio Coppola, Matteo Maggiori, Brent Neiman, Jesse Schreger
26855.abstract: Global firms finance themselves through foreign subsidiaries, often shell companies in tax havens, which obscures their true economic location in official statistics. We associate the universe of traded securities issued by firms in tax havens with their issuer's ultimate parent and restate bilateral investment positions to better reflect the financial linkages connecting countries around the world. Portfolio investment from developed countries to firms in large emerging markets is dramatically larger than previously thought. The national accounts of the United States, for example, understate the U.S. position in Chinese firms by nearly 600 billion dollars, while China's official net creditor position to the rest of the world is overstated by about 50 percent. Further, we demonstrate how offshore issuance in tax havens affects our understanding of the currency composition of external portfolio liabilities and the nature of foreign direct investment. Finally, we provide additional restatements of bilateral investment positions, including one based the geographic distribution of sales.
26855.zh_abstract: 全球企业通过外国子公司（通常是避税天堂的空壳公司）进行融资，这掩盖了它们在官方统计中的真实经济所在地。我们将避税天堂企业发行的所有交易证券与其发行人的最终母公司关联起来，并重新表述双边投资头寸，以更好地反映连接世界各国的金融联系。从发达国家到大型新兴市场企业的组合投资规模比之前认为的要大得多。例如，美国的国民账户将美国在中国企业的头寸低估了近6000亿美元，而中国对世界其他地区的官方净债权头寸则被高估了约50%。此外，我们展示了避税天堂的离岸发行如何影响我们对外部组合负债的货币构成以及外国直接投资性质的理解。最后，我们提供了双边投资头寸的额外重新表述，包括基于销售地理分布的表述。
26855.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, LE, ME, PE；JEL：E0, F0, G0

26854.title: Heterogeneous Globalization: Offshoring and Reorganization
26854.zh_title: 异质性全球化：离岸外包与重组
26854.authors: Andrew B. Bernard, Teresa C. Fort, Valerie Smeets, Frederic Warzynski
26854.abstract: This paper exploits a unique offshoring survey to show that firms continue domestic production of the same goods they offshore to low-wage countries. This shift towards “produced-good imports” coincides with a reallocation of labor from physical production to innovation and technology occupations, and an increase in domestically-produced varieties' unit values. These responses suggest an additional, firm-level benefit of trade liberalization: the opportunity to offshore production of low-quality varieties, thereby freeing up domestic resources for the development, production, and marketing of higher-quality varieties. Firms’ reactions also motivate a new offshoring measure – produced- good imports – that is readily observed in most firm-level datasets.
26854.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项独特的离岸外包调查表明，企业继续在国内生产它们离岸外包到低工资国家的相同商品。这种向“生产商品进口”的转变与劳动力从体力生产向创新和技术职业的重新分配，以及国内生产品种单位价值的增加同时发生。这些反应表明了贸易自由化的另一个企业层面收益：将低质量品种的生产离岸外包的机会，从而释放国内资源用于开发、生产和营销更高质量的品种。企业的反应也激发了一个新的离岸外包衡量指标——生产商品进口——这在大多数企业层面数据集中很容易观察到。
26854.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F14, F16, F23, F61, L23, L25

26853.title: Do Consumers Distinguish Fixed Cost from Variable Cost? “Schmeduling" in Two-Part Tariffs in Energy
26853.zh_title: 消费者能区分固定成本与可变成本吗？能源两部制电价中的“Schmeduling”
26853.abstract: A central assumption in economics is that consumers properly distinguish fixed cost from variable cost. This assumption is fundamental to various economic theories, including optimal taxation, redistribution, and price discrimination. Using a quasi-experiment in heating price reform in China, we find empirical evidence that is inconsistent with this conventional assumption and more consistent with the “schmeduling” model in Liebman and Zeckhauser (2004). As we demonstrate the policy implications for two-part energy tariffs, this consumer behavior makes fixed cost directly relevant to the perceived relative prices of goods, and therefore alters the welfare implications of price, tax, and subsidy designs.
26853.zh_abstract: 经济学中的一个核心假设是消费者能够正确区分固定成本与可变成本。这一假设是各种经济理论的基础，包括最优税收、再分配和价格歧视。利用中国供暖价格改革中的一项准实验，我们发现了与这一传统假设不一致、而与Liebman和Zeckhauser（2004）的“schmeduling”模型更为一致的实证证据。当我们展示其对两部制能源电价的政策含义时，这种消费者行为使得固定成本直接与感知的商品相对价格相关，从而改变了价格、税收和补贴设计的福利含义。
26853.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO；JEL：L38, L51, L97, O1, O38, O44, Q4, Q41, Q5, Q53, Q56

26852.title: The Shadow Margins of Labor Market Slack
26852.zh_title: 劳动力市场松弛的影子边际
26852.authors: R. Jason Faberman, Andreas I. Mueller, Ayşegül Şahin, Giorgio Topa
