26852.abstract: We use a mix of new and existing data to develop the Aggregate Hours Gap (AHG), a novel measure of labor market underutilization. Our measure differentiates individuals by detailed categories of labor market participation and uses data on their desired work hours as a measure of their potential labor supply. We show that desired hours vary widely by demographics and detailed labor force status, and that the gap between desired and actual work hours is strongly positively correlated with reported search effort. The Aggregate Hours Gap suggests a more sluggish labor market recovery since the Great Recession than either the official unemployment rate or alternative measures of labor market underutilization. Modest amounts of underutilization among the part-time employed and a substantial degree of underutilization among those out of the labor force account for the disparity. The Aggregate Hours Gap also does well in accounting for wage movements over our sample period.
26852.zh_abstract: 我们结合新数据和现有数据，开发了总工时缺口（AHG），这是一种衡量劳动力利用不足的新指标。我们的指标按详细的劳动力参与类别区分个体，并使用他们期望工作小时的数据作为潜在劳动力供给的衡量标准。我们发现，期望工时因人口统计特征和详细的劳动力状态而异，且期望工时与实际工时之间的差距与报告的工作搜寻努力呈强正相关。总工时缺口表明，自大衰退以来，劳动力市场复苏比官方失业率或其他劳动力利用不足的替代指标所显示的要更为缓慢。兼职就业者中适度的利用不足以及劳动力队伍外人群中显著的利用不足解释了这种差异。总工时缺口在我们样本期内对工资变动的解释也表现良好。

26851.title: Capital Flow Waves—or Ripples? Extreme Capital Flow Movements Since the Crisis
26851.zh_title: 资本流动浪潮——还是涟漪？危机以来的极端资本流动变动
26851.authors: Kristin J. Forbes, Francis E. Warnock
26851.abstract: Has the occurrence of “extreme capital flow movements”—episodes of sudden surges, stops, flight and retrenchment—changed since the Global Financial Crisis (GFC)? This paper addresses this question by updating and building on the dataset and methodology introduced in Forbes and Warnock (2012) to calculate the occurrence of sharp capital flow movements by foreigners and domestics into and out of individual countries. The results suggest that the occurrence of these extreme capital flow movements has not increased since the GFC. The drivers of these episodes, however, appear to have changed since the GFC. Extreme capital flow movements are less correlated with changes in global risk, and are more difficult to explain with basic global, regional and domestic variables. What used to be large global “waves” in international capital flows have more recently become idiosyncratic “ripples”.
26851.zh_abstract: 自全球金融危机以来，“极端资本流动变动”——即突然激增、骤停、外逃和回撤等事件——的发生是否发生了变化？本文通过更新并基于Forbes和Warnock（2012）的数据集和方法论来回答这个问题，计算外国人和国内居民进出各国的剧烈资本流动的发生情况。结果表明，自全球金融危机以来，这些极端资本流动变动的发生并未增加。然而，这些事件的驱动因素似乎自全球金融危机以来发生了变化。极端资本流动变动与全球风险变化的相关性减弱，且更难以用基本的全球、区域和国内变量来解释。过去国际资本流动中巨大的全球“浪潮”，在近期已转变为独特的“涟漪”。

26850.title: Unpacking Household Engel Curves
26850.authors: Philippe De Vreyer, Sylvie Lambert, Martin Ravallion
26850.abstract: The classic Working-Leser household Engel curve is unpacked to reveal individual budget allocations across commodities as a function of both individual and household total spending. Two main findings emerge on calibrating our model to an unusual sub-household dataset for Senegal. First, for all except education spending, our results are consistent with the separable structures found in two-stage bargaining and collective models of the household. Second, there are large biases in standard household Engel-curve estimates when compared to consistently aggregated sub-household estimates, though in differing degrees and directions depending on the type of commodity. The main source of bias is a household effect on sub-household spending behavior, though this is partially offset by a bias due to intra-household inequality, which emerges as a confounder in aggregating to the household level.
26850.zh_abstract: 经典的Working-Leser家庭恩格尔曲线被解析，以揭示个人在商品间的预算分配，该分配是个人和家庭总支出的函数。在将我们的模型校准到塞内加尔一个不寻常的子家庭数据集时，出现了两个主要发现。首先，除教育支出外，我们的结果与家庭两阶段议价和集体模型中发现的可分离结构一致。其次，与一致加总的子家庭估计相比，标准家庭恩格尔曲线估计存在较大偏差，尽管偏差的程度和方向因商品类型而异。偏差的主要来源是家庭对子家庭支出行为的影响，但这部分被家庭内不平等导致的偏差所抵消，后者在加总到家庭层面时成为一个混杂因素。

26849.title: A Method to Estimate Discrete Choice Models that is Robust to Consumer Search
26849.zh_title: 一种对消费者搜寻具有稳健性的离散选择模型估计方法
26849.abstract: We state a sufficient condition under which choice data alone suffices to identify consumer preferences when choices are not fully informed. Suppose that: (i) the data generating process is a search model in which the attribute hidden to consumers is observed by the econometrician; (ii) if a consumer searches good j, she also searches goods which are better than j in terms of the non-hidden component of utility; and (iii) consumers choose the good that maximizes overall utility among searched goods. Canonical models will be biased: the value of the hidden attribute will be understated because consumers will be unresponsive to variation in the attribute for goods that they do not search. Under the conditions above and additional mild restrictions, an alternative method of recovering preferences using cross derivatives of choice probabilities succeeds regardless of the search protocol and is thus robust to whether consumers are informed. The approach nests several standard models, including full information. Our methods suggest natural tests for full information and can be used to forecast how consumers will respond to additional information. We verify in a lab experiment that our approach succeeds in recovering preferences when consumers engage in costly search.
26849.zh_abstract: 我们陈述了一个充分条件，在该条件下，当选择并非完全知情时，仅凭选择数据就足以识别消费者偏好。假设：（i）数据生成过程是一个搜寻模型，其中对消费者隐藏的属性被计量经济学家观察到；（ii）如果消费者搜寻商品j，她也会搜寻在效用的非隐藏成分方面优于j的商品；（iii）消费者在搜寻到的商品中选择最大化总效用的商品。经典模型将存在偏差：隐藏属性的价值会被低估，因为消费者对未搜寻商品中该属性的变化没有反应。在上述条件和额外的温和限制下，一种利用选择概率交叉导数来恢复偏好的替代方法无论搜寻协议如何都能成功，因此对消费者是否知情具有稳健性。该方法包含了几种标准模型，包括完全信息模型。我们的方法为完全信息提供了自然的检验，并可用于预测消费者如何应对额外信息。我们通过一个实验室实验验证了，当消费者进行有成本搜寻时，我们的方法能够成功恢复偏好。
26849.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, ED, EH, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C5, C8, C9, D0, D6, D8

26848.title: The Weak State Trap
26848.authors: Leopoldo Fergusson, Carlos A. Molina, James A. Robinson
26848.abstract: Development outcomes come in ‘clusters’ that seem difficult to exit. Using original data from Colombia, we present evidence of the interconnection between two critical political components: state weakness and clientelism. State weakness creates the right environment for clientelism to flourish. Clientelism sets in place a structure of incentives for politicians and citizens that is detrimental to building state capacity. We show that vote buying, as a measure of clientelism, and tax evasion, as a measure of state weakness, are highly correlated at the micro level. We also report evidence that both practices are widely accepted in society, a result consistent with a deeply entrenched relationship of mutually reinforcing influences. Finally, we propose a set of mechanisms that underlie the hypothesis that a weak state and widespread clientelism are part of a political equilibrium with multiple feedback loops. Our results suggest that state weakness is a trap that is likely hard to exit.
26848.zh_abstract: 发展结果呈现出似乎难以摆脱的“集群”特征。利用来自哥伦比亚的原始数据，我们提供了国家软弱和庇护主义这两个关键政治组成部分相互关联的证据。国家软弱为庇护主义的繁荣创造了合适的环境。庇护主义则为政治家和公民建立了一套不利于国家能力建设的激励结构。我们表明，作为庇护主义衡量指标的贿选，与作为国家软弱衡量指标的逃税，在微观层面高度相关。我们还报告了证据，表明这两种做法在社会中被广泛接受，这一结果与根深蒂固的相互强化影响关系一致。最后，我们提出了一套机制，支撑了弱国家和普遍庇护主义是带有多个反馈循环的政治均衡一部分的假设。我们的结果表明，国家软弱是一个可能难以摆脱的陷阱。

26847.title: The Risk of Caution: Evidence from an R&D Experiment
26847.zh_title: 谨慎的风险：来自研发实验的证据
26847.authors: Richard Carson, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Jordan Louviere, Sally Sadoff, Jeffrey G. Shrader Jr
26847.abstract: Innovation is important for firm performance and broader economic growth. But breakthrough innovations necessarily require greater risk-taking than more incremental approaches. To understand how managers respond to uncertainty when making research and development decisions, we conducted three experiments with master’s degree students in a program focused on the intersection of business and technology. Study participants were asked to choose whether to fund hypothetical research projects using a process that mirrors real-world research and development funding decisions. The experiments provided financial rewards that disproportionately encouraged the choice of higher-risk projects. Despite these incentives, most participants chose lower-risk projects at the expense of projects more likely to generate a large payoff. We also elicited participants’ personal risk preferences and found that decision-makers who are more tolerant of risk were more likely to fund breakthrough projects. The results suggest that the risk preferences of managers in charge of research investments may have an oversized effect on the rate of breakthrough innovation and the profitability of firms.
26847.zh_abstract: 创新对企业绩效和更广泛的经济增长至关重要。但突破性创新必然需要比渐进式方法承担更大的风险。为了理解管理者在做出研发决策时如何应对不确定性，我们与一个专注于商业与技术交叉领域的硕士项目学生进行了三项实验。研究参与者被要求使用模拟现实世界研发资金决策的过程，选择是否资助假设的研究项目。这些实验提供了财务奖励，不成比例地鼓励选择高风险项目。尽管有这些激励，大多数参与者选择了低风险项目，而牺牲了更可能产生高回报的项目。我们还获取了参与者的个人风险偏好，发现对风险容忍度更高的决策者更有可能资助突破性项目。结果表明，负责研究投资的管理者的风险偏好可能对突破性创新的速度和公司盈利能力产生过大影响。

26846.title: Rebates in the Pharmaceutical Industry: Evidence from Medicines Sold in Retail Pharmacies in the U.S.
26846.zh_title: 制药行业的返利：来自美国零售药店销售药品的证据
26846.authors: Pragya Kakani, Michael Chernew, Amitabh Chandra
26846.abstract: Rising list prices are often used to illustrate the burden of prescription drug spending, but payers routinely negotiate rebates from manufacturers that generate differences between list and net prices. List prices are easily available and affect patient cost-sharing, but net prices are confidential and affect innovation incentives. We use novel data on medicines sold in a retail setting to quantify rebate growth, the sensitivity of pharmaceutical price indices to list versus net prices, and contribution of net price growth to revenue growth. From 2012 to 2017, we find average rebates increased from 32% to 48%, owing entirely to growth in rebate-levels over a product lifetime rather than shifts towards high rebate products. Annual inflation of list prices was 12% while that of net prices was 3%, implying that financial rewards to manufacturers per unit sold have not grown proportionally to list prices. This pattern is mirrored in 19 of the 20 top drug classes by revenue including insulins, where list and net price inflation were 16% and 2% annually respectively. Finally, we find price growth explains 76% of revenue growth when measured by list prices but 31% of revenue growth when measured by net prices. Moreover, new product entry is the most important factor affecting pharmaceutical revenue growth. These findings provide a cautionary note on using list prices for policy analysis.
26846.zh_abstract: 不断上涨的标价常被用来说明处方药支出的负担，但支付方通常会与制造商协商返利，这导致标价和净价之间存在差异。标价容易获取并影响患者自付费用，但净价是保密的并影响创新激励。我们使用关于零售环境中销售药品的新数据来量化返利增长、药品价格指数对标价与净价的敏感性，以及净价增长对收入增长的贡献。从2012年到2017年，我们发现平均返利从32%增加到48%，这完全归因于产品生命周期内返利水平的增长，而非向高返利产品的转变。标价的年通胀率为12%，而净价的年通胀率为3%，这意味着制造商每单位销售的财务回报并未与标价成比例增长。这一模式在按收入排名的前20大药品类别中的19个中得到了体现，包括胰岛素，其标价和净价年通胀率分别为16%和2%。最后，我们发现，当以标价衡量时，价格增长解释了76%的收入增长，但当以净价衡量时，仅解释了31%的收入增长。此外，新产品进入是影响制药收入增长的最重要因素。这些发现为在政策分析中使用标价提供了警示。

26882.title: The Macroeconomics of Epidemics
26882.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
26882.abstract: We extend the canonical epidemiology model to study the interaction between economic decisions and epidemics. Our model implies that people cut back on consumption and work to reduce the chances of being infected. These decisions reduce the severity of the epidemic but exacerbate the size of the associated recession. The competitive equilibrium is not socially optimal because infected people do not fully internalize the effect of their economic decisions on the spread of the virus. In our benchmark model, the best simple containment policy increases the severity of the recession but saves roughly half a million lives in the United States.
26882.zh_abstract: 我们扩展了经典流行病学模型，以研究经济决策与流行病之间的相互作用。我们的模型意味着，人们会减少消费和工作以降低被感染的机会。这些决策减轻了流行病的严重程度，但加剧了相关经济衰退的规模。竞争均衡并非社会最优，因为感染者没有完全内化其经济决策对病毒传播的影响。在我们的基准模型中，最佳简单遏制政策加剧了衰退的严重程度，但在美国挽救了大约50万人的生命。

26881.title: What Do We Learn From Cross-Regional Empirical Estimates in Macroeconomics?
26881.zh_title: 我们从宏观经济学的跨区域实证估计中学到了什么？
26881.authors: Adam Guren, Alisdair McKay, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
26881.abstract: Recent empirical work uses variation across cities or regions to identify the effects of economic shocks of interest to macroeconomists. The interpretation of such estimates is complicated by the fact that they reflect both partial equilibrium and local general equilibrium effects of the shocks. We propose an approach for recovering estimates of partial equilibrium effects from these cross-regional empirical estimates. The basic idea is to divide the cross-regional estimate by an estimate of the local fiscal multiplier, which measures the strength of local general equilibrium amplification. We apply this approach to recent estimates of housing wealth effects based on city-level variation, and derive conditions under which the adjustment is exact. We then evaluate its accuracy in a richer general equilibrium model of consumption and housing. The paper also reconciles the positive cross-sectional correlation between house price growth and construction with the notion that cities with larger price volatility have lower housing supply elasticities using a model in which housing supply elasticities are more dispersed in the long run than in the short run.
26881.zh_abstract: 最近的实证工作利用城市或地区间的差异来识别宏观经济学家感兴趣的经济冲击的影响。对这些估计的解释因它们同时反映了冲击的部分均衡和局部一般均衡效应而变得复杂。我们提出了一种方法，从这些跨区域实证估计中恢复部分均衡效应的估计值。基本思想是将跨区域估计值除以局部财政乘数的估计值，后者衡量了局部一般均衡放大的强度。我们将此方法应用于基于城市层面差异的住房财富效应的最新估计，并推导出调整精确成立的条件。然后，我们在一个更丰富的消费和住房一般均衡模型中评估其准确性。本文还通过一个模型，其中住房供给弹性在长期比短期更分散，调和了房价增长与建设之间的正向横截面相关性与价格波动较大的城市具有较低住房供给弹性的观点。

26880.title: Early Childhood Education and Life-cycle Health
26880.zh_title: 早期儿童教育与生命周期健康
26880.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
26880.abstract: This paper forecasts the life-cycle treatment effects on health of a high-quality early childhood program. Our predictions combine microsimulation using non-experimental data with experimental data from a midlife long-term follow-up. The follow-up incorporated a full epidemiological exam. The program mainly benefits males and significantly reduces the prevalence of heart disease, stroke, cancer, and mortality across the life-cycle. For men, we estimate an average reduction of 3.8 disability-adjusted years (DALYs). The reduction in DALYs is relatively small for women. The gain in quality-adjusted life years (QALYs) is almost enough to offset all of the costs associated with program implementation for males and half of program costs for women.
26880.zh_abstract: 本文预测了一个高质量早期儿童项目对健康的生命周期处理效应。我们的预测结合了使用非实验数据的微观模拟和来自中年长期跟踪的实验数据。该跟踪包含了一次完整的流行病学检查。该项目主要惠及男性，并显著降低了整个生命周期中心脏病、中风、癌症的患病率和死亡率。对于男性，我们估计平均减少了3.8个残疾调整生命年。对于女性，残疾调整生命年的减少相对较小。质量调整生命年的增加几乎足以抵消男性项目实施的所有成本，以及女性项目成本的一半。

26879.title: Medical Spending, Bequests, and Asset Dynamics Around the Time of Death
26879.zh_title: 死亡前后的医疗支出、遗产与资产动态
26879.authors: John Bailey Jones, Mariacristina De Nardi, Eric French, Rory McGee, Rachel Rodgers
26879.abstract: Using data from the Health and Retirement Survey, we document the changes in assets that occur before a person's death. Applying an event study approach, we find that during the 6 years preceding their deaths, the assets of single decedents decline, relative to those of similar single survivors, by an additional $\$20,000$ on average. Over the same time span, the assets of couples who lose a spouse fall, relative to those of similar surviving couples, by an additional $\$90,000$ on average. Households experiencing a death also incur higher out-of-pocket medical spending and other end-of-life expenses. This elevated spending is sufficient to explain (in accounting terms) the asset declines observed for singles but falls short of explaining the declines observed for couples. Bequests from the dying spouse to non-spousal heirs such as children are more than sufficient to explain the remainder.
26879.zh_abstract: 利用健康与退休调查的数据，我们记录了个人死亡前发生的资产变化。应用事件研究方法，我们发现，在死亡前的6年间，单身逝者的资产相对于类似的单身幸存者平均额外减少了约20,000美元。在同一时间段内，失去配偶的夫妇的资产相对于类似的幸存夫妇平均额外减少了约90,000美元。经历死亡的家庭还承担了更高的自付医疗支出和其他临终费用。这种增加的支出足以（在会计意义上）解释单身者观察到的资产下降，但不足以解释夫妇观察到的下降。从逝者配偶到非配偶继承人（如子女）的遗产足以解释剩余部分。

26878.title: Gross Worker Flows and Fluctuations in the Aggregate Labor Market
26878.zh_title: 总劳动力市场中的总工人流动与波动
26878.authors: Per Krusell, Toshihiko Mukoyama, Richard Rogerson, Ayşegül Şahin
26878.abstract: We build a three-state general equilibrium model of the aggregate labor market that features both standard labor supply forces and labor market frictions. Our model matches key features of the cyclical properties of employment, unemployment, and nonparticipation as well as those of gross worker flows across these three labor market states. Our key finding is that shocks to labor market frictions play a dominant role in accounting for labor market fluctuations. This is in contrast to the focus of the traditional RBC literature, which emphasized how employment fluctuations arise as a consequence of labor supply responses to price changes induced by TFP shocks.
26878.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含标准劳动力供给力量和劳动力市场摩擦的总劳动力市场三状态一般均衡模型。我们的模型匹配了就业、失业和非参与以及这三个劳动力市场状态之间总工人流动的周期性特征的关键特征。我们的主要发现是，劳动力市场摩擦冲击在解释劳动力市场波动中起着主导作用。这与传统RBC文献的焦点形成对比，后者强调就业波动是如何作为对TFP冲击引起的价格变化的劳动力供给反应的结果而产生的。

26877.title: Comparing Alternative China and US Arrangements with CPTPP
26877.zh_title: 中国和美国与CPTPP的替代安排比较
26877.authors: Chunding Li, Xin Lin, John Whalley
26877.abstract: This paper builds a 29-country numerical general equilibrium model with inside money and trade cost to simulate and compare the effects of China and the US taking part in the Comprehensive and Progressive Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP), which is a high standard mega regional trade agreement. Comparison results show that China will benefit CPTPP member countries more than the US on trade, GDP, and manufacturing employment. China’s entering the CPTPP can also benefit most non-member countries on GDP and manufacturing employment. By joining, the US will benefit the whole world more, as the US economic scale is larger than that of China. Our simulation results reveal that China will be more welcomed to the CPTPP by member countries.
26877.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个包含内部货币和贸易成本的29国数值一般均衡模型，以模拟和比较中国和美国加入《全面与进步跨太平洋伙伴关系协定》（CPTPP）的效果，该协定是一个高标准的大型区域贸易协定。比较结果表明，在贸易、GDP和制造业就业方面，中国比美国更能使CPTPP成员国受益。中国加入CPTPP也可以在GDP和制造业就业方面使大多数非成员国受益。通过加入，美国将使整个世界受益更多，因为美国的经济规模大于中国。我们的模拟结果显示，中国将更受CPTPP成员国的欢迎。

26876.title: Understanding Cross-country Differences in Health Status and Expenditures
26876.zh_title: 理解健康状况与医疗支出的跨国差异
26876.authors: Raquel Fonseca, François Langot, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Thepthida Sopraseuth
26876.abstract: Using a general equilibrium heterogeneous agent model featuring health production, we quantify the contribution of health price in explaining cross-country differences in health expenditures and health status. Considering other country-specific explanatory factors, U.S. health prices are estimated to be 33% higher than those of European countries. This price differential explains more than 60% of the difference in health expenditures and more than half of the difference in health status between Europe and the U.S. Despite its large impact at the aggregate level, these price differences increase the lifetime cost of living of Americans by two percentage points.
26876.zh_abstract: 通过一个包含健康生产的一般均衡异质性主体模型，我们量化了健康价格在解释跨国医疗支出与健康状况差异中的贡献。在考虑其他国别特定解释因素后，美国健康价格估计比欧洲国家高出33%。这一价格差异解释了欧美之间医疗支出差异的60%以上，以及健康状况差异的一半以上。尽管在总体层面影响巨大，但这些价格差异使美国人的终身生活成本增加了两个百分点。

26875.title: Same-Sex Couples and the Marital Surplus: The Importance of the Legal Environment
26875.zh_title: 同性伴侣与婚姻剩余：法律环境的重要性
26875.abstract: Same-sex couples’ marital surplus, their excess total income over that predicted by their work times and predicted wages, increases little as the duration of their relationship lengthens. When/where same-sex marriage is legal, it rises sharply as duration increases. The availability of legal domestic partnership or civil union has no effect on the surplus. The likelihood of home ownership conditional on demographic characteristics also increases with partnerships’ duration only when/where same-sex marriage is legal. These results, based on data from the American Community Survey 2013-17, support the notion that greater legal protection enhances partners’ incentives to invest in their relationship.
26875.zh_abstract: 同性伴侣的婚姻剩余——即其总收入超过基于工作时间与预测工资所预期水平的部分——随着关系持续时间的延长而增长甚微。当同性婚姻合法时，该剩余随持续时间延长而急剧上升。合法同居伴侣或民事结合的可得性对剩余没有影响。基于人口特征的住房拥有概率也仅在同性婚姻合法时随伴侣关系持续时间增加而上升。这些基于2013-17年美国社区调查数据的结果支持了更强法律保护能增强伴侣关系投资激励的观点。

26874.title: Harry Johnson’s “Case for Flexible Exchange Rates” – 50 Years Later
26874.zh_title: 哈里·约翰逊的“浮动汇率案例”——50年后
26874.abstract: Fifty years ago, Harry G. Johnson published “The Case for Flexible Exchange Rates, 1969,” its title echoing Milton Friedman’s classic essay of the early 1950s. Though somewhat forgotten today, Johnson’s reprise was an important element in the late 1960s debate over the future of the international monetary system. The present paper has three objectives. The first is to lay out the historical context in which Johnson’s “Case” was written and read. The second is to examine Johnson’s main points and see how they stand up to nearly five decades of experience with floating exchange rates since the end of the Bretton Woods system. The third is to review the most recent academic critiques of exchange-rate flexibility and ask how fatal they are to Johnson’s basic argument. I conclude that the essential case for exchange rate flexibility still stands strong.
26874.zh_abstract: 五十年前，哈里·G·约翰逊发表了《浮动汇率案例，1969》，其标题呼应了米尔顿·弗里德曼1950年代初的经典文章。尽管如今有些被遗忘，约翰逊的这篇重述在1960年代末关于国际货币体系未来的辩论中是一个重要元素。本文有三个目标。第一是阐述约翰逊《案例》写作与阅读时的历史背景。第二是审视约翰逊的主要观点，并考察它们在布雷顿森林体系终结后近五十年的浮动汇率经验中是否依然成立。第三是回顾学术界对汇率灵活性的最新批评，并评估它们对约翰逊基本论点的致命程度。我得出结论：汇率灵活性的基本案例依然稳固。

26873.title: Market Design, Human Behavior, and Management
26873.zh_title: 市场设计、人类行为与管理
26873.authors: Yan Chen, Peter Cramton, John A. List, Axel Ockenfels
26873.abstract: We review past research and discuss future directions on how the vibrant research areas of market design and behavioral economics have influenced and will continue to impact the science and practice of management in both the private and public sectors. Using examples from various auction markets, reputation and feedback systems in online markets, matching markets in education, and labor markets, we demonstrate that combining market design theory, behavioral insights, and experimental methods can lead to fruitful implementation of superior market designs in practice.
26873.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了过去的研究，并讨论了市场设计和行为经济学这两个活跃研究领域如何影响并将继续影响私营和公共部门管理的科学与实践的未来方向。通过来自各种拍卖市场、在线市场的声誉与反馈系统、教育匹配市场以及劳动力市场的例子，我们证明了将市场设计理论、行为洞察和实验方法相结合，可以在实践中实现更优市场设计的富有成效的实施。
26873.meta: Programs：IO, LS；JEL：C91, C93, D4, D47, D9

26872.title: FRED-QD: A Quarterly Database for Macroeconomic Research
26872.zh_title: FRED-QD：一个用于宏观经济研究的季度数据库
26872.abstract: In this paper we present and describe a large quarterly frequency, macroeconomic database. The data provided are closely modeled to that used in Stock and Watson (2012a). As in our previous work on FRED-MD, our goal is simply to provide a publicly available source of macroeconomic “big data” that is updated in real time using the FRED database. We show that factors extracted from this data set exhibit similar behavior to those extracted from the original Stock and Watson data set. The dominant factors are shown to be insensitive to outliers, but outliers do affect the relative influence of the series as indicated by leverage scores. We then investigate the role unit root tests play in the choice of transformation codes with an emphasis on identifying instances in which the unit root-based codes differ from those already used in the literature. Finally, we show that factors extracted from our data set are useful for forecasting a range of macroeconomic series and that the choice of transformation codes can contribute substantially to the accuracy of these forecasts.
26872.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们介绍并描述了一个大型季度频率宏观经济数据库。所提供的数据与Stock和Watson（2012a）中使用的数据紧密相似。正如我们之前关于FRED-MD的工作一样，我们的目标仅仅是提供一个使用FRED数据库实时更新的、公开可用的宏观经济“大数据”来源。我们表明，从该数据集中提取的因子表现出与从原始Stock和Watson数据集中提取的因子相似的行为。主导因子对异常值不敏感，但异常值确实会影响序列的相对影响，如杠杆分数所示。然后，我们研究了单位根检验在转换代码选择中的作用，重点识别了基于单位根的代码与文献中已使用的代码不同的情况。最后，我们表明，从我们的数据集中提取的因子对于预测一系列宏观经济序列是有用的，并且转换代码的选择可以对这些预测的准确性产生显著贡献。

26871.title: Out of the Woodwork: Enrollment Spillovers in the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
26871.zh_title: 从暗处涌现：俄勒冈健康保险实验中的参保溢出效应
26871.authors: Adam Sacarny, Katherine Baicker, Amy Finkelstein
26871.abstract: We analyze the impact of expanded adult Medicaid eligibility on the Medicaid enrollment of already-eligible children. To do so, we exploit the 2008 Oregon Medicaid lottery, in which some low-income uninsured adults were randomly selected for the chance to apply for Medicaid. Children in these households were eligible for Medicaid irrespective of whether the household won the lottery. We estimate statistically significant but transitory impacts of adult lottery selection on children’s Medicaid enrollment: for every 9 adults who enroll in Medicaid due to the lottery, one additional child also enrolls at the same time. Our results shed light on the existence, magnitude, and nature of so-called “woodwork effects”.
26871.zh_abstract: 我们分析了扩大成人医疗补助资格对已有资格儿童医疗补助参保的影响。为此，我们利用了2008年俄勒冈医疗补助抽签，其中一些低收入无保险成年人被随机选中获得申请医疗补助的机会。这些家庭中的儿童无论家庭是否中签都有资格获得医疗补助。我们估计了成人中签对儿童医疗补助参保的统计显著但暂时的影响：每9名因抽签而参保医疗补助的成年人中，就有1名儿童同时额外参保。我们的结果揭示了所谓的“木工效应”的存在、程度和性质。

26870.title: German Long-Term Health Insurance: Theory Meets Evidence
26870.zh_title: 德国长期健康保险：理论与证据的相遇
26870.authors: Juan Pablo Atal, Hanming Fang, Martin Karlsson, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
26870.abstract: German long-term health insurance (GLTHI) represents the largest market for private long-term health insurance contracts in the world. We show that GLTHI’s contract design coincides with the optimal dynamic contract for individuals with constant lifetime income profiles. After estimating the key ingredients of a life-cycle model, we find that, under a variety of assumptions, GLTHI achieves welfare that is at most 4% lower than for the optimal contract. Relative to the gains of replacing short-term contracts with either long-term contract, this welfare gap is smallest when reclassification risk is high.
26870.zh_abstract: 德国长期健康保险（GLTHI）是世界上最大的私人长期健康保险合同市场。我们表明，GLTHI的合同设计与具有恒定终身收入曲线的个人的最优动态合同一致。在估计了生命周期模型的关键要素后，我们发现，在各种假设下，GLTHI实现的福利最多比最优合同低4%。相对于用任何一种长期合同替代短期合同所带来的收益，当重分类风险高时，这一福利差距最小。

26869.title: Chain Restaurant Calorie Posting Laws, Obesity, and Consumer Welfare
26869.zh_title: 连锁餐厅卡路里标示法、肥胖与消费者福利
26869.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, David E. Frisvold, David Jimenez-Gomez, Mariétou Ouayogodé, Michael Price
26869.abstract: The 2010 Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act (ACA) introduced a mandate requiring chain restaurants to post calorie counts on menus and menu boards. This paper investigates whether and why calorie posting laws work. To do so, we develop a model of calories consumed that highlights two potential channels through which mandates influence choice and outlines an empirical strategy to disentangle these alternatives. We test the predictions of our model using data from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System to compare changes in body mass index (BMI), obesity, and consumer well-being in locations that implemented calorie-posting laws between 2008 and 2011 to those in neighboring locations without such laws. We find that calorie mandates lead to a small but statistically significant reduction in average BMI of 0.2 kg/m² (1.5 pounds) and reductions in self-reported measures of life satisfaction. Quantile regressions provide evidence that reductions in BMI and life satisfaction are concentrated among those with healthy weight. Viewed in its totality, the pattern of results is consistent with an economic model in which calorie labels influence consumers both by providing information and by imposing a welfare-reducing moral cost on unhealthy eating.
26869.zh_abstract: 2010年《患者保护与平价医疗法案》（ACA）引入了一项强制要求，规定连锁餐厅必须在菜单和菜单板上标示卡路里数量。本文研究了卡路里标示法是否有效以及为何有效。为此，我们建立了一个卡路里消费模型，突出了强制要求影响选择的两个潜在渠道，并概述了区分这些替代方案的实证策略。我们使用行为风险因素监测系统的数据，比较了2008年至2011年间实施卡路里标示法的地区与没有此类法律的邻近地区在身体质量指数（BMI）、肥胖和消费者福祉方面的变化，从而检验了模型的预测。我们发现，卡路里强制要求导致平均BMI小幅但统计显著地降低了0.2 kg/m²（1.5磅），并降低了自我报告的生活满意度指标。分位数回归提供的证据表明，BMI和生活满意度的降低集中在体重健康的人群中。总体来看，这一结果模式与一个经济模型一致，在该模型中，卡路里标签既通过提供信息影响消费者，也通过对不健康饮食施加降低福利的道德成本来影响消费者。

26868.title: Migration Costs and Observational Returns to Migration in the Developing World
26868.zh_title: 发展中国家的迁移成本与迁移的观测回报
26868.authors: David Lagakos, Samuel Marshall, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Corey Vernot, Michael E. Waugh
26868.abstract: Recent studies find that observational returns to rural-urban migration are near zero in three developing countries. We revisit this result using panel tracking surveys from six countries, finding higher returns on average. We then interpret these returns in a multi-region Roy model with heterogeneity in migration costs. In the model, the observational return to migration confounds the urban premium and the individual benefits of migrants, and is not directly informative about the welfare gain from lowering migration costs. Patterns of regional heterogeneity in returns, and a comparison of experimental to observational returns, are consistent with the model’s predictions.
26868.zh_abstract: 近期研究发现，在三个发展中国家，农村到城市迁移的观测回报率接近于零。我们利用来自六个国家的面板追踪调查数据重新审视这一结果，发现平均回报率更高。随后，我们在一个包含迁移成本异质性的多区域Roy模型中解释这些回报。在该模型中，迁移的观测回报混淆了城市溢价与迁移者的个体收益，并不能直接反映降低迁移成本所带来的福利改善。回报的区域异质性模式，以及实验回报与观测回报的比较，均与模型的预测一致。

26867.title: What Will Be the Economic Impact of COVID-19 in the US? Rough Estimates of Disease Scenarios
26867.zh_title: COVID-19对美国经济的影响将是什么？基于疾病情景的粗略估计
26867.abstract: This note is intended to introduce economists to a simple SIR model of the progression of COVID-19 in the United States over the next 12-18 months. An SIR model is a Markov model of the spread of an epidemic in a population in which the total population is divided into categories of being susceptible to the disease (S), actively infected with the disease (I), and recovered (or dead) and no longer contagious (R). How an epidemic plays out over time is determined by the transition rates between these three states. This model allows for quantitative statements regarding the tradeoff between the severity and timing of suppression of the disease through social distancing and the progression of the disease in the population. Example applications of the model are provided. Special attention is given to the question of if and when the fraction of active infections in the population exceeds 1% (at which point the health system is forecast to be severely challenged) and 10% (which may result in severe staffing shortages for key financial and economic infrastructure) as well as the cumulative burden of the disease over an 18 month horizon.
26867.zh_abstract: 本文旨在向经济学家介绍一个简单的SIR模型，用于模拟未来12至18个月内COVID-19在美国的传播进程。SIR模型是一个马尔可夫模型，描述流行病在人群中的传播，其中总人口被分为易感人群（S）、活跃感染人群（I）以及康复（或死亡）且不再具有传染性的人群（R）。流行病随时间如何发展，取决于这三个状态之间的转换率。该模型能够对通过社交距离抑制疾病的严重程度与时机，以及疾病在人群中的传播进程之间的权衡，进行定量分析。本文提供了该模型的应用示例。特别关注以下问题：活跃感染人口比例何时以及是否超过1%（届时预计医疗系统将面临严峻挑战）和10%（可能导致关键金融和经济基础设施出现严重人员短缺），以及18个月时间跨度内疾病的累积负担。

26866.title: The Coronavirus and the Great Influenza Pandemic: Lessons from the “Spanish Flu” for the Coronavirus’s Potential Effects on Mortality and Economic Activity
26866.zh_title: 冠状病毒与1918年大流感：从“西班牙流感”看冠状病毒对死亡率和经济活动的潜在影响
26866.authors: Robert J. Barro, José F. Ursúa, Joanna Weng
26866.abstract: Mortality and economic contraction during the 1918-1920 Great Influenza Pandemic provide plausible upper bounds for outcomes under the coronavirus (COVID-19). Data for 48 countries imply flu-related deaths in 1918-1920 of 40 million, 2.1 percent of world population, implying 150 million deaths when applied to current population. Regressions with annual information on flu deaths 1918-1920 and war deaths during WWI imply flu-generated economic declines for GDP and consumption in the typical country of 6 and 8 percent, respectively. There is also some evidence that higher flu death rates decreased realized real returns on stocks and, especially, on short-term government bills.
26866.zh_abstract: 1918-1920年大流感期间的死亡率和经济收缩，为冠状病毒（COVID-19）可能造成的结果提供了合理的上限。来自48个国家的数据显示，1918-1920年流感相关死亡人数为4000万，占世界人口的2.1%，若按当前人口计算，则相当于1.5亿人死亡。利用1918-1920年流感死亡人数和第一次世界大战期间战争死亡人数的年度信息进行的回归分析表明，在典型国家，流感导致的GDP和消费经济下降幅度分别为6%和8%。还有一些证据表明，较高的流感死亡率降低了股票，尤其是短期政府债券的实际实现回报率。

26865.title: International Transactions: Real Trade and Factor Flows between 1700 and 1870
26865.zh_title: 国际交易：1700年至1870年间的实际贸易与要素流动
26865.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Markus Lampe, Carol H. Shiue
26865.abstract: This paper describes broad regional and temporal trends in the evolution of international trade and international factor flows between 1700 and 1870, including key differences in trade costs across space and time. We find trade links in Western Europe and the European colonies of North America intensified at the same time these regions experienced the initial industrial revolution and the spread of industrialization, which led to sustained economic growth. At the same time, global differences in specialization and income emerged. To understand the contribution of global market forces, as well as colonialism to these differences, the chapter lays out theoretical reasons for links between trade and economic growth and examines related historical arguments and evidence. We conclude that trade contributed to global divergence, but the magnitude and mechanisms through which trade affected global welfare lies not so much in the direct impact of trade and specialization, but in multiplier effects emerging from the interactions of trade with other factors that affect economic development.
26865.zh_abstract: 本文描述了1700年至1870年间国际贸易和国际要素流动演变的广泛区域与时间趋势，包括贸易成本在空间和时间上的关键差异。我们发现，西欧和北美欧洲殖民地的贸易联系在同一时期加强，这些地区经历了最初的工业革命和工业化的扩散，从而导致了持续的经济增长。与此同时，全球范围内的专业化和收入差异也随之出现。为了理解全球市场力量以及殖民主义对这些差异的贡献，本章阐述了贸易与经济增长之间联系的理论原因，并考察了相关的历史论点和证据。我们得出结论，贸易促进了全球分化，但贸易影响全球福利的幅度和机制，与其说在于贸易和专业化的直接影响，不如说在于贸易与其他影响经济发展的因素相互作用所产生的乘数效应。

26864.title: Can Mentoring Help Female Assistant Professors in Economics? An Evaluation by Randomized Trial
26864.zh_title: 导师制能否帮助经济学领域的女性助理教授？一项随机试验的评估
26864.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Janet Currie, Francine D. Blau, Rachel Croson
26864.abstract: Women continue to be underrepresented in academic ranks in the economics profession. The Committee on the Status of Women in the Economics Profession of the American Economics Association established the CeMENT mentoring workshop to support women in research careers. The program was designed as a randomized controlled trial. This study evaluates differences between the treatment and control groups in career outcomes. Results indicate that relative to women in the control group, treated women are more likely to stay in academia and more likely to have received tenure in an institution ranked in the top 30 or 50 in economics in the world.\n
26864.zh_abstract: 在经济学界，女性在学术职位中的代表性仍然不足。美国经济学会经济学界女性地位委员会设立了CeMENT导师制研讨会，以支持女性从事研究职业。该项目被设计为一项随机对照试验。本研究评估了处理组和对照组在职业成果上的差异。结果表明，与对照组中的女性相比，接受处理的女性更有可能留在学术界，并且更有可能在全球经济学排名前30或前50的机构中获得终身教职。

26863.title: Occupational Skill Premia around the World: New Data, Patterns and Drivers
26863.zh_title: 全球职业技能溢价：新数据、模式与驱动因素
26863.authors: David Kunst, Richard B. Freeman, Remco Oostendorp
26863.abstract: Firms hire workers to undertake tasks and activities associated with particular occupations, which makes occupations a fundamental unit in economic analyses of the labor market. Using a unique dataset on pay in identically defined occupations in developing and advanced countries, we find that in most countries occupational skill premia narrowed substantially from the 1950s to the 1980s, then widened through the 2000s, creating a U-shaped pattern of change. The narrowing was due in part to the huge worldwide increase in the supply of educated workers. The subsequent widening was due in part to the weakening of trade unions and a shift in demand to more skilled workers associated with rising trade. The data indicate that supply, demand, and institutional forces are all drivers of occupational skill premia, ruling out simple single factor explanations of change. The paper concludes with a call for improving the collection of occupational wage data to understand future changes in the world of work.
26863.zh_abstract: 企业雇佣工人来执行与特定职业相关的任务和活动，这使得职业成为劳动力市场经济分析的基本单位。利用发展中国家和发达国家中定义相同的职业薪酬的独特数据集，我们发现，在大多数国家，职业技能溢价从1950年代到1980年代大幅收窄，随后在2000年代再次扩大，形成了U型变化模式。收窄的部分原因是全球范围内受教育工人供给的巨大增长。随后的扩大部分是由于工会力量的削弱，以及与贸易增长相关的对技能工人需求的转变。数据表明，供给、需求和制度力量都是职业技能溢价的驱动因素，排除了单一因素解释变化的可能性。本文最后呼吁改进职业工资数据的收集，以理解未来工作世界的变化。
26863.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：F1, I2, J2, J3, J5, O3

26899.title: Externalities in International Tax Enforcement: Theory and Evidence
26899.zh_title: 国际税收执法中的外部性：理论与证据
26899.authors: Thomas R. Tørsløv, Ludvig S. Wier, Gabriel Zucman
26899.abstract: We show that the fiscal authorities of high-tax countries can lack the incentives to combat profit shifting to tax havens. Instead, they have incentives to focus their enforcement efforts on relocating profits booked by multinationals in other high-tax countries, crowding out the enforcement on transactions that shift profits to tax havens, and reducing the global tax payments of multinational companies. This incentive problem can help explain why profit shifting to low-tax countries persists despite its tax revenue cost for high-tax countries. The predictions of our model are motivated and supported by the analysis of two new datasets: the universe of transfer price corrections conducted by the Danish tax authority, and new cross-country data on international tax enforcement. Both of these datasets shows that that tax authorities in high-tax countries focus their transfer pricing enforcement effort on correcting transactions with other high-tax countries rather than transactions involving tax havens.
26899.zh_abstract: 我们表明，高税率国家的财政当局可能缺乏打击向避税天堂转移利润的激励。相反，他们有动机将执法重点放在纠正跨国公司从其他高税率国家转移的利润上，从而挤出了对向避税天堂转移利润交易的执法，并减少了跨国公司的全球纳税额。这种激励问题有助于解释为何向低税率国家转移利润的行为持续存在，尽管这给高税率国家带来了税收收入损失。我们模型预测的动机和支撑来自对两个新数据集的分析：丹麦税务机关进行的全部转让定价调整数据，以及新的跨国国际税收执法数据。这两个数据集均显示，高税率国家的税务机关将其转让定价执法努力集中在纠正与其他高税率国家的交易上，而非涉及避税天堂的交易。

26898.title: An Analytic Framework For Interpreting Investment Regressions In The Presence Of Financial Constraints
26898.zh_title: 存在融资约束时解释投资回归的分析框架
26898.abstract: A financial constraint that prevents access to external funds induces non-classical measurement error in average q as a proxy for unobservable marginal q. Unlike classical measurement error, this measurement error biases upward the coefficient on average q in a univariate regression of investment on average q. In a multiple regression of investment on average q and cash flow, the coefficient on cash flow is positive. The positive cash-flow coefficient indicates the presence of a financial constraint, but it does not indicate a shortage of liquidity to fund current investment. In addition, the coefficient on average q is biased downward.
26898.zh_abstract: 阻止获取外部资金的融资约束会在平均q作为不可观测的边际q的代理变量时引入非经典测量误差。与经典测量误差不同，这种测量误差在投资对平均q的单变量回归中会使平均q的系数向上偏误。在投资对平均q和现金流的多重回归中，现金流的系数为正。正的现金流系数表明存在融资约束，但并不表示缺乏为当前投资提供资金的流动性。此外，平均q的系数向下偏误。

26897.title: The Virus of Fear: The Political Impact of Ebola in the U.S.
26897.zh_title: 恐惧病毒：埃博拉在美国的政治影响
26897.authors: Filipe R. Campante, Emilio Depetris-Chauvin, Ruben Durante
26897.abstract: We study how fear can affect the behavior of voters and politicians by looking at the Ebola scare that hit the U.S. a month before the 2014 midterm elections. Exploiting the timing and location of the four cases diagnosed in the U.S., we show that heightened concern about Ebola, as measured by online activity, led to a lower vote share for the Democrats in congressional and gubernatorial elections, as well as lower turnout, despite no evidence of a general anti-incumbent effect (including on President Obama's approval ratings). We then show that politicians responded to the Ebola scare by mentioning the disease in connection with immigration and terrorism in newsletters and campaign ads. This response came only from Republicans, especially those facing competitive races, suggesting a strategic use of the issue in conjunction with topics perceived as favorable to them. Survey evidence suggests that voters responded with increasingly conservative attitudes on immigration but not on other ideologically-charged issues. Taken together, our findings indicate that emotional reactions associated with fear can have a strong electoral impact, that politicians perceive and act strategically in response to this, and that the process is mediated by issues that can be plausibly associated with the specific fear-triggering factor.
26897.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究2014年中期选举前一个月袭击美国的埃博拉恐慌，探讨恐惧如何影响选民和政客的行为。利用美国确诊的四例病例的时间和地点，我们表明，以在线活动衡量的对埃博拉担忧的加剧，导致民主党在国会和州长选举中的得票率下降，以及投票率降低，尽管没有证据表明存在普遍的反在位效应（包括对奥巴马总统支持率的影响）。然后我们表明，政客们通过在新通讯和竞选广告中将该疾病与移民和恐怖主义联系起来，对埃博拉恐慌做出了回应。这种回应仅来自共和党人，尤其是那些面临激烈竞争的共和党人，这表明他们策略性地利用该议题，将其与他们认为对自己有利的话题相结合。调查证据表明，选民在移民问题上表现出日益保守的态度，但在其他意识形态色彩浓厚的问题上则不然。综合来看，我们的发现表明，与恐惧相关的情绪反应可能产生强大的选举影响，政客们会感知到这一点并做出策略性回应，而这一过程通过那些可能与特定恐惧触发因素合理关联的议题来中介。

26896.title: The Effects of State Scope of Practice Laws on the Labor Supply of Advanced Practice Registered Nurses
26896.zh_title: 州执业范围法律对高级执业注册护士劳动力供给的影响
26896.abstract: This paper studies the effects of changes in states’ scope of practice laws (SOP) for advanced practice registered nurses (APRNs) on individual labor supply decisions. Restrictive SOP impose costs and other barriers to practice that may affect these decisions. Using survey data on APRNs, we analyze employment in nursing, work hours, part-time work status, multiple job holding, self-employment, wages, and migration. Results show that the level of SOP restrictions are not strong determinants of many labor market decisions, with a few exceptions. We find that hours worked and self-employment both increase when nurses practice in regulatory environments that are free from physician oversight requirements.
26896.zh_abstract: 本文研究了州对高级执业注册护士（APRNs）的执业范围法律（SOP）变化对个人劳动力供给决策的影响。限制性SOP施加了成本和其他执业障碍，可能影响这些决策。利用APRNs的调查数据，我们分析了护理行业的就业、工作时间、兼职工作状态、多重工作持有、自雇、工资和迁移。结果显示，除少数例外，SOP限制水平并非许多劳动力市场决策的强决定因素。我们发现，当护士在没有医生监督要求的监管环境中执业时，工作时间和自雇均有所增加。
26896.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I1, J01, K0

26895.title: Off to a Good Start: The NBER and the Measurement of National Income
26895.zh_title: 良好开端：NBER与国民收入核算
26895.abstract: The creation of the National Bureau of Economic Research was a response to the bitter controversies over the distribution of income that roiled the United States during the Progressive Era. Thanks to Malcolm Rorty, a business economist, and Nahum I. Stone, an independent socialist economist, a “Committee on the Distribution of Income” was created; what might be considered the first name of the Bureau. Funding was secured, the Bureau was chartered in 1920, and Wesley Mitchell was appointed the director of research. The Bureau’s first publication, Income in the United States, its Amount and Distribution was widely hailed as a major contribution. Further estimates of national income and its distribution for the 1920s were made by Willford King and Lillian Epstein. The Great Depression led to legislation requiring federal government estimates. Simon Kuznets was seconded from the Bureau to the Commerce Department where he led the team that produced the first federal estimates and established the unit for producing updates. The early investigators at the Bureau proved to be masters of combining sources of data to produce credible estimates. The result was estimates that still underlie our understanding of the growth and fluctuations of the American Economy.
26895.zh_abstract: 国家经济研究局的创建是对进步时代美国因收入分配问题引发的激烈争议的回应。得益于商业经济学家马尔科姆·罗蒂和独立社会主义经济学家纳胡姆·I·斯通，一个“收入分配委员会”得以成立；这可以被视为该局最初的名称。资金得到保障，该局于1920年获得特许，韦斯利·米切尔被任命为研究主任。该局的第一份出版物《美国的收入：其数量与分配》被广泛誉为一项重大贡献。威尔福德·金和莉莲·爱泼斯坦对20世纪20年代的国民收入及其分配进行了进一步估算。大萧条导致了要求联邦政府进行估算的立法。西蒙·库兹涅茨从该局借调到商务部，领导了制作首批联邦估算的团队，并建立了负责后续更新的部门。该局的早期研究者们被证明是善于结合数据来源以产生可信估算的大师。其结果是我们至今仍赖以理解美国经济增长与波动的估算基础。

26894.title: The Economics of the Fed Put
26894.zh_title: 美联储看跌期权的经济学
26894.abstract: Since the mid-1990s, low stock returns predict accommodating policy by the Federal Reserve. This fact emerges because, over this period, negative stock returns comove with downgrades to the Fed’s growth expectations. Textual analysis of the FOMC documents reveals that policymakers pay attention to the stock market, and their negative stock-market mentions predict federal funds rate cuts. The primary mechanism why policymakers find the stock market informative is via its effect on consumption, with a smaller role for the market viewed as predicting the economy.
26894.zh_abstract: 自20世纪90年代中期以来，低股票回报预示着美联储将采取宽松政策。这一现象的出现是因为在此期间，负的股票回报与美联储增长预期的下调共同变动。对联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）文件的文本分析显示，政策制定者关注股票市场，而他们对股票市场的负面提及预示着联邦基金利率的下调。政策制定者认为股票市场具有信息价值的主要机制是通过其对消费的影响，而市场作为经济预测指标的作用较小。

26893.title: Self-Citation, Cumulative Advantage, and Gender Inequality in Science
26893.zh_title: 自引、累积优势与科学领域的性别不平等
26893.abstract: In science, self-citation is often interpreted as an act of self-promotion that (artificially) boosts the visibility of one’s prior work in the short term, which could then inflate professional authority in the long term. Recently, in light of research on the gender gap in self-promotion, two, large-scale studies of publications examine if women self-cite less than men. But they arrive at conflicting conclusions; one concludes yes whereas the other, no. We join the debate with an original study of 36 cohorts of life scientists (1970–2005) followed through 2015 (or death or retirement). We track not only the rate of self-citation per unit of past productivity, but also the likelihood of self-citing intellectually distant material and the rate of return on self-citations with respect to a host of major career outcomes, including grants, future citations, and job changes. With comprehensive, longitudinal data, we find no evidence whatsoever of a gender gap in self-citation practices or returns. Men may very well be more aggressive self-promoters than women, but this dynamic does not manifest in our sample with respect to self-citation practices. Implications of our null findings are discussed, particularly with respect to gender inequality in scientific careers more broadly.
26893.zh_abstract: 在科学界，自引通常被解释为一种自我推销行为，短期内（人为地）提升自己先前工作的可见度，进而可能长期膨胀专业权威。最近，鉴于关于自我推销性别差距的研究，两项大规模的出版物研究考察了女性是否比男性自引更少。但它们得出了相互矛盾的结论：一项结论为是，而另一项则否。我们通过一项对36个生命科学家队列（1970-2005年）的原创研究加入这场辩论，这些队列被追踪至2015年（或死亡或退休）。我们不仅追踪了每单位过去生产力的自引率，还追踪了自引智力上遥远材料的可能性，以及自引在包括资助、未来引用和职位变动等一系列主要职业成果上的回报率。利用全面的纵向数据，我们未发现任何关于自引实践或回报存在性别差距的证据。男性可能确实比女性更积极地自我推销，但这种动态在我们的样本中并未体现在自引实践上。我们讨论了零结果的含义，特别是关于更广泛科学职业中的性别不平等。

26892.title: The Rise of For-Profit Experimental Medicine
26892.zh_title: 营利性实验医学的兴起
26892.abstract: Beginning around 1990, academic medical centers have ceased to be the primary locus of industry-sponsored clinical trial activity. Instead, clinical trials have increasingly been conducted in private practices and for-profit, dedicated study sites. We examine the underlying causes of this startling evolution. On the demand side, the greater availability of non-academic investigators has enabled pharmaceutical firms to better match physicians' skills with specific projects. On the supply side, we argue that the growth of managed care health insurance has contributed to a rise in the number of non-academic physicians performing clinical research. We find evidence consistent with these claims using a unique data set containing information about 85,919 site contracts for 7,735 clinical trials between 1991 and 2003. Furthermore, we examine the gap in prevailing prices for comparable procedures conducted for clinical trials versus conventional medical care, and conclude that the effect of managed care on entry is consistent with non-academic physicians “inducing demand” so as to resist downward pressures on their income.
26892.zh_abstract: 大约从1990年开始，学术医疗中心已不再是行业资助临床试验活动的主要场所。相反，临床试验越来越多地在私人诊所和营利性专门研究机构中进行。我们考察了这一惊人演变的根本原因。在需求方面，非学术研究人员的更多可用性使制药公司能够更好地将医生的技能与特定项目相匹配。在供给方面，我们认为管理式医疗健康保险的增长促进了从事临床研究的非学术医生数量的增加。我们使用一个独特的数据集（包含1991年至2003年间7735项临床试验的85919份机构合同信息）发现了与这些说法一致的证据。此外，我们考察了临床试验与常规医疗中可比程序现行价格的差距，并得出结论：管理式医疗对进入的影响与非学术医生“诱导需求”以抵抗其收入下行压力是一致的。

26891.title: Paying Outsourced Labor: Direct Evidence from Linked Temp Agency-Worker-Client Data
26891.zh_title: 支付外包劳动力：来自关联临时工中介-工人-客户数据的直接证据
26891.authors: Andres Drenik, Simon Jäger, Miguel Pascuel Plotkin, Benjamin Schoefer
26891.abstract: We estimate how much firms differentiate pay premia between regular and outsourced workers. We study temp agency work arrangements where pay setting has previously escaped measurement because existing datasets do not report links between user firms (the workplaces where temp workers perform their labor) and temp agencies (their formal employers). We overcome this measurement challenge by leveraging unique administrative data from Argentina with such links. We estimate that temp agency workers receive 49% of the workplace-specific pay premia earned by regular workers in user firms: the midpoint between the benchmark for insiders (one) and the competitive spot-labor market benchmark (zero).
26891.zh_abstract: 我们估计了企业在正式员工和外包工人之间区分工资溢价的幅度。我们研究临时工中介工作安排，其中工资设定此前无法测量，因为现有数据集未报告用户企业（临时工执行劳动的工作场所）与临时工中介（其正式雇主）之间的关联。我们通过利用阿根廷具有此类关联的独特行政数据克服了这一测量挑战。我们估计，临时工中介工人获得的用户企业特定工资溢价是正式工人所获工资溢价的49%：介于内部人基准（1）和竞争性现货劳动力市场基准（0）的中点。
26891.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, LS, PR；JEL：J31, J53, K31, L24, M52, M54

26890.title: Measuring Welfare and Inequality with Incomplete Price Information
26890.zh_title: 在不完全价格信息下衡量福利与不平等
26890.authors: David Atkin, Benjamin Faber, Thibault Fally, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro
26890.abstract: We propose and implement a new approach that allows us to estimate income-specific changes in household welfare in contexts where well-measured prices are not available for important subsets of consumption. Using rich but widely available expenditure survey microdata, we show that we can recover income-specific equivalent and compensating variations as long as preferences fall within the broad quasi-separable class (Gorman 1970; 1976). Our approach is flexible enough to allow for non-parametric estimation at each point of the income distribution. We implement this approach to estimate inflation and welfare changes in rural India between 1987 and 2000, and to revisit the impacts of India’s trade reforms. Our estimates reveal that lower rates of inflation for the rich erased the real income convergence documented by the existing literature that uses the subset of consumption with well-measured prices to calculate inflation.
26890.zh_abstract: 我们提出并实施了一种新方法，使我们能够在重要消费子集缺乏良好测量价格的情况下，估计家庭福利的收入特定变化。利用丰富但广泛可得的支出调查微观数据，我们表明，只要偏好属于广义准可分类别（Gorman 1970; 1976），我们就可以恢复收入特定的等价变化和补偿变化。我们的方法足够灵活，允许在收入分布的每个点进行非参数估计。我们实施这一方法，估计了1987年至2000年间印度农村的通货膨胀和福利变化，并重新审视了印度贸易改革的影响。我们的估计揭示，富人较低的通货膨胀率抹去了现有文献所记录的实际收入趋同，这些文献使用具有良好测量价格的消费子集来计算通货膨胀。
26890.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：D12, E31, F63, O12

26889.title: Scientific Grant Funding
26889.abstract: This chapter provides an overview of grant funding as an innovation policy tool aimed at both practitioners and science policy scholars. We first discuss how grants relate to other contractual mechanisms such as patents, prizes, or procurement contracts, and argue that, among these, grants are likely to be the most effective way of supporting early-stage, exploratory science. Next, we provide a brief history of the modern scientific grant and discuss the current state of knowledge regarding several key elements of the design of grant programs: the choice of program scope, the design of peer review, as well as approaches for creating incentives for risk-taking and translation for grant recipients. We argue that, in making these choices, policy-makers might consider adopting a portfolio-based mindset that seeks a diversity of approaches, while accepting that high failure rates for individual projects is in fact part of an effective grant-making program. Finally, increased rigor in the evaluation of grant programs is likely to raise the quality of funded proposals. In particular, randomized controlled trials and other quasi-experimental techniques might enable policy makers to communicate and enhance the impact that these programs have on discovery and innovation, thereby creating a stronger justification for their expansion or continued existence.
26889.zh_abstract: 本章概述了作为创新政策工具的资助拨款，面向实践者和科学政策学者。我们首先讨论拨款如何与其他合同机制（如专利、奖项或采购合同）相关联，并认为在这些机制中，拨款可能是支持早期探索性科学的最有效方式。接下来，我们简要介绍了现代科学拨款的历史，并讨论了关于拨款计划设计几个关键要素的当前知识状况：计划范围的选择、同行评审的设计，以及为拨款接受者创造冒险和转化激励的方法。我们认为，在做出这些选择时，政策制定者可能会考虑采用基于投资组合的思维方式，寻求方法的多样性，同时接受单个项目的高失败率实际上是有效拨款计划的一部分。最后，提高拨款计划评估的严谨性可能会提高资助提案的质量。特别是，随机对照试验和其他准实验技术可能使政策制定者能够传达并增强这些计划对发现和创新的影响，从而为其扩展或持续存在提供更强有力的理由。

26888.title: The Mid-Life Dip in Well-Being: Economists (Who Find It) Versus Psychologists (Who Don't)!
26888.zh_title: 中年幸福感低谷：经济学家（发现它）与心理学家（不发现它）！
26888.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Carol L. Graham
26888.abstract: A number of studies – including our own – find a mid-life dip in well-being. We review a psychology literature that claims that the evidence of a U-shape is "overblown" and if there is such a decline it is "trivial". We find remarkably strong and consistent evidence across countries and US states that statistically significant U-shapes exist with and without socio-economic controls. The US is somewhat of an outlier with evidence of an early uptick in the raw data with some variables – but not in others – that disappears when controls are included. We show that two of the studies cited by psychologists suggesting there are no U-shapes are in error; we use their data and find the opposite. The effects of the mid-life dip are comparable to major life events like losing a spouse, losing a job or getting cancer. They are clearly not inconsequential.
26888.zh_abstract: 多项研究——包括我们自己的——发现中年幸福感存在低谷。我们回顾了心理学文献，这些文献声称U形曲线的证据被“夸大”，如果存在这种下降，那也是“微不足道的”。我们发现，跨国家和美国各州存在显著且一致的证据，表明无论是否包含社会经济控制变量，统计上显著的U形曲线都存在。美国在某种程度上是一个异常值，在某些变量（但非其他变量）的原始数据中显示出早期上升的证据，当加入控制变量后，这种上升消失。我们表明，心理学家引用的两项表明不存在U形曲线的研究存在错误；我们使用他们的数据并发现了相反的结果。中年低谷的影响与重大生活事件（如失去配偶、失业或患癌）相当。它们显然并非无关紧要。

26887.title: Bank Stress Testing: Public Interest or Regulatory Capture?
26887.zh_title: 银行压力测试：公共利益还是监管俘获？
26887.authors: Thomas Ian Schneider, Philip E. Strahan, Jun Yang
26887.abstract: We test whether measures of potential influence on regulators affect stress test outcomes. The large trading banks – those most plausibly ‘Too big to Fail’ – face the toughest tests. In contrast, we find no evidence that either political or regulatory connections affect the tests. Stress tests have a greater effect on the value of large trading banks’ portfolios; the large trading banks respond by making more conservative capital plans; and, despite their more conservative capital plans, the large trading banks still fail their tests more frequently than other banks. These results are consistent with a public-interest view of regulation, not regulatory capture.
26887.zh_abstract: 我们检验了对监管者潜在影响力的衡量指标是否影响压力测试结果。大型交易银行——那些最可能“大而不能倒”的银行——面临最严格的测试。相反，我们没有发现政治或监管关系影响测试的证据。压力测试对大型交易银行投资组合价值的影响更大；大型交易银行通过制定更保守的资本计划来应对；尽管其资本计划更为保守，但大型交易银行仍比其他银行更频繁地未能通过测试。这些结果与监管的公共利益观点一致，而非监管俘获。

26886.title: Innovation and Entrepreneurship in Housing
26886.zh_title: 住房领域的创新与创业
26886.abstract: In this chapter, I discuss innovation and entrepreneurship in residential real estate and construction (housing). Based on R&D spending and patent statistics, housing does not appear to be a very innovative sector. But in the last two decades, there has been a significant increase in the amount of investment going to real estate technology companies. I discuss the companies and technologies which have drawn the most attention from investors. I then review the literature on two major innovation trends in housing: the growth of the internet as a tool for housing search, and the development of home-sharing platforms which allow homeowners to use their homes as short-term rentals. These innovations have likely increased the efficiency of housing markets, leading to higher quality matches between buyers and sellers, and more efficient utilization of space. However, the effects are hard to measure due to the difficulty of separating quality changes from price changes. In comparison to residential real estate, there appears to have been less recent innovation in residential construction. In many areas, residential construction is artificially constrained by local land use policies, and estimates from the literature suggest that relaxing these constraints could increase economic growth significantly. Finally, I discuss anti-competitive practices in real estate which may hinder entrepreneurship and the adoption of new innovations, and I discuss how innovation and entrepreneurship in other sectors may affect the housing market.
26886.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我讨论了住宅房地产和建筑（住房）领域的创新与创业。基于研发支出和专利统计，住房似乎不是一个非常创新的部门。但在过去二十年中，投入房地产科技公司的投资额显著增加。我讨论了最受投资者关注的公司和技术。然后，我回顾了关于住房领域两大创新趋势的文献：互联网作为住房搜索工具的增长，以及允许房主将其房屋用作短期租赁的房屋共享平台的发展。这些创新可能提高了住房市场的效率，导致买卖双方之间更高质量的匹配，以及空间更有效的利用。然而，由于难以将质量变化与价格变化分开，其影响难以衡量。与住宅房地产相比，住宅建筑领域近期的创新似乎较少。在许多地区，住宅建筑受到地方土地使用政策的人为限制，文献中的估计表明，放松这些限制可能显著促进经济增长。最后，我讨论了房地产中可能阻碍创业和新创新采用的反竞争做法，并探讨了其他部门的创新与创业如何影响住房市场。

26885.title: Copyright and Creativity. Evidence from Italian Opera During the Napoleonic Age
26885.zh_title: 版权与创造力：拿破仑时代意大利歌剧的证据
26885.abstract: This paper exploits exogenous variation in the adoption of copyrights – as a result of the timing of Napoléon’s military victories in Italy – to examine the effects of copyrights on creativity. To measure changes in creative output we compare changes in the creation of new operas across states with and without copyrights. Difference-in-differences analyses show that basic copyrights increased both the number and the quality of operas, measured by their popularity and durability. Notably, there is no evidence of comparable benefits for extensions in copyright lengths. Complementary analyses for other types of musical compositions confirm the main results.
26885.zh_abstract: 本文利用版权采用的 exogenous 变化——由于拿破仑在意大利军事胜利的时间——来考察版权对创造力的影响。为了衡量创造性产出的变化，我们比较了有版权和没有版权的各州之间新歌剧创作的变化。双重差分分析表明，基本版权增加了歌剧的数量和质量，以其流行度和持久性衡量。值得注意的是，没有证据表明版权期限的延长带来了类似的益处。对其他类型音乐作品的补充分析证实了主要结果。
26885.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, PR；JEL：K0, N23, O3, O34

26884.title: Government Incentives for Entrepreneurship
26884.abstract: In the dozen years since the Global Financial Crisis, there has been a surge of interest on the part of governments in promoting entrepreneurial activity, largely by providing financing. This essay explores these policies, focusing on financial incentives to entrepreneurs and the intermediaries who fund them. The motivation for these efforts is clear: the well-documented relationships between economic growth, innovation, entrepreneurship and venture capital. Yet despite good intentions, many of these public initiatives have ended in disappointment. I argue that these failures have not simply been a matter of bad luck. Instead, the unfortunate outcomes have reflected the fundamental structural issues that make it difficult for governments to launch sustained successful efforts to promote entrepreneurship over sustained periods. I highlight several critical challenges, and outline two principles that might render these efforts more effective.
26884.zh_abstract: 自全球金融危机以来的十多年间，各国政府通过提供融资等方式促进创业活动的兴趣激增。本文探讨了这些政策，重点关注对创业者及其资助中介的财政激励。这些努力的动机显而易见：经济增长、创新、创业和风险投资之间已有充分证据的关系。然而，尽管初衷良好，许多此类公共举措最终令人失望。我认为这些失败并非仅仅是运气不佳。相反，这些不幸的结果反映了根本性的结构性问题，使得政府难以在长期内持续成功地推动创业。我强调了几个关键挑战，并概述了两条可能使这些努力更有效的原则。

26883.title: Inference for Ranks with Applications to Mobility across Neighborhoods and Academic Achievement across Countries
26883.zh_title: 基于排名的推断：跨社区流动性与跨国学业成就的应用
26883.authors: Magne Mogstad, Joseph P. Romano, Azeem Shaikh, Daniel Wilhelm
26883.abstract: It is often desired to rank diﬀerent populations according to the value of some feature of each population. For example, it may be desired to rank neighborhoods according to some measure of intergenerational mobility or countries according to some measure of academic achievement. These rankings are invariably computed using estimates rather than the true values of these features. As a result, there may be considerable uncertainty concerning the rank of each population. In this paper, we consider the problem of accounting for such uncertainty by constructing conﬁdence sets for the rank of each population. We consider both the problem of constructing marginal conﬁdence sets for the rank of a particular population as well as simultaneous conﬁdence sets for the ranks of all populations. We show how to construct such conﬁdence sets under weak assumptions. An important feature of all of our constructions is that they remain computationally feasible even when the number of populations is very large. We apply our theoretical results to re-examine the rankings of both neighborhoods in the United States in terms of intergenerational mobility and developed countries in terms of academic achievement. The conclusions about which countries do best and worst at reading, math, and science are fairly robust to accounting for uncertainty. The conﬁdence sets for the ranking of the 50 most populous commuting zones by measures of mobility are also found to be small. These rankings, however, become much less informative if one includes all commuting zones, if one considers neighborhoods at a more granular level (counties, Census tracts), or if one uses movers across areas to address concerns about selection.
26883.zh_abstract: 人们常常希望根据每个群体的某些特征值对不同的群体进行排名。例如，可能希望根据某种代际流动性指标对社区进行排名，或根据某种学业成就指标对国家进行排名。这些排名总是使用这些特征的估计值而非真实值来计算。因此，每个群体的排名可能存在相当大的不确定性。在本文中，我们考虑通过为每个群体的排名构建置信集来解决这种不确定性的问题。我们既考虑了为特定群体的排名构建边际置信集的问题，也考虑了为所有群体的排名构建联合置信集的问题。我们展示了如何在弱假设下构建这样的置信集。我们所有构建方法的一个重要特点是，即使群体数量非常大，它们在计算上仍然可行。我们将我们的理论结果应用于重新审视美国社区在代际流动性方面的排名以及发达国家在学业成就方面的排名。关于哪些国家在阅读、数学和科学方面表现最好和最差的结论，在考虑不确定性后相当稳健。按流动性指标对50个人口最多的通勤区进行排名的置信集也被发现很小。然而，如果包括所有通勤区，或者考虑更细粒度的社区（县、人口普查区），或者使用跨区域迁移者来解决选择性问题，这些排名就会变得信息量大大降低。

26845.title: The Environmental Bias of Trade Policy
26845.abstract: This paper describes a new fact, then analyzes its causes and consequences: in most countries, import tariffs and non-tariff barriers are substantially lower on dirty than on clean industries, where an industry's “dirtiness” is defined as its carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions per dollar of output. This difference in trade policy creates a global implicit subsidy to CO2 emissions in internationally traded goods and so contributes to climate change. This global implicit subsidy to CO2 emissions totals several hundred billion dollars annually. The greater protection of downstream industries, which are relatively clean, substantially accounts for this pattern. The downstream pattern can be explained by theories where industries lobby for low tariffs on their inputs but final consumers are poorly organized. A quantitative general equilibrium model suggests that if countries applied similar trade policies to clean and dirty goods, global CO2 emissions would decrease and global real income would change little.
26845.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个新事实，然后分析了其原因和后果：在大多数国家，对肮脏行业的进口关税和非关税壁垒显著低于对清洁行业的，其中行业的“肮脏程度”以其每单位产出的二氧化碳排放量定义。贸易政策上的这种差异为国际贸易商品中的二氧化碳排放创造了全球性隐性补贴，从而加剧了气候变化。这种全球性二氧化碳排放隐性补贴总额每年达数千亿美元。对相对清洁的下游行业提供更大保护，在很大程度上解释了这种模式。下游模式可以用以下理论解释：行业游说要求对其投入品征收低关税，而最终消费者组织性较差。一个定量的一般均衡模型表明，如果各国对清洁和肮脏商品实施类似的贸易政策，全球二氧化碳排放量将减少，而全球实际收入变化不大。
26845.meta: Programs：EEE, IFM, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：F13, F18, F6, H23, Q50, Q56
